    Variable GAME_CONFIGConst

    GAME_CONFIG: {
        advisory: {
            compositeStrategy: {
                consistencyWeight: 0.3;
                lossMarginWeight: 0.3;
                topViabilityWeight: 0.4;
            };
            consistencyWindow: 6;
            driftPenalty: {
                consistencyThreshold: 0.3;
                effectivenessPenalty: -0.05;
                popularityDecayPerTurn: -2;
            };
            focusBonus: { consistencyThreshold: 0.7; effectivenessBonus: 0.05 };
            gradeThresholds: { A: 75; B: 60; C: 45; D: 30; S: 90 };
            grandStrategyPresets: {
                adaptive: "Adaptive";
                diplomaticBroker: "DiplomaticBroker";
                economicHegemon: "EconomicHegemon";
                militarySuperpower: "MilitarySuperpower";
                survivalMode: "SurvivalMode";
            };
            lossWarning: {
                critical: 3;
                criticalPercentage: 0.1;
                warning: 6;
                watch: 12;
            };
            pivotDetection: { consecutiveTurnsThreshold: 2 };
            projectionHorizons: { endgame: 60; immediate: 3; mediumTerm: 12 };

                clarityThreshold: 50;
                highClarityAccuracyBand: 3;
                lowClarityAccuracyBand: 8;
            };

            desperationModeStabilityThreshold: 20;

                aggressive: { aggression: 1.5; riskTolerance: 1.5 };
                balanced: { aggression: 1; riskTolerance: 1 };
                cautious: { aggression: 0.5; riskTolerance: 0.5 };
            };
        };
        aiDifficulty: {
            aggressive: {
                aggressionMultiplier: 1.8;

                riskToleranceMultiplier: 0.6;

            lowReadiness: { combatEffectivenessPenalty: -0.25; threshold: 30 };

                highThreshold: 70;

                lowThreshold: 30;

                minimumAccuracy: 20;

            archetypes: {
                Dove: {
                    description: "Diplomatic peacemaker who exhausts negotiation before considering force.";
                    label: "Dove";
                    psychology: {
                        decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                        narcissism: 20;
                        paranoia: 30;
                        patience: 85;
                        pragmatism: 75;
                        riskTolerance: 25;
                        stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                        vengefulIndex: 15;
                    };
                };
                Hawk: {
                    description: "Aggressive militarist who favors decisive force over diplomacy.";
                    label: "Hawk";
                    psychology: {
                        decisionStyle: "Intuitive";
                        narcissism: 55;
                        paranoia: 60;
                        patience: 25;
                        pragmatism: 40;
                        riskTolerance: 80;
                        stressResponse: "Escalate";
                        vengefulIndex: 75;
                    };
                };
                Populist: {
                    description: "Charismatic leader who prioritizes domestic popularity over international norms.";
                    label: "Populist";
                    psychology: {
                        decisionStyle: "Transactional";
                        narcissism: 80;
                        paranoia: 70;
                        patience: 30;
                        pragmatism: 60;
                        riskTolerance: 65;
                        stressResponse: "Deflect";
                        vengefulIndex: 65;
                    };
                };
                Technocrat: {
                    description: "Data-driven strategist who values efficiency, institutions, and long-term planning.";
                    label: "Technocrat";
                    psychology: {
                        decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                        narcissism: 15;
                        paranoia: 25;
                        patience: 80;
                        pragmatism: 85;
                        riskTolerance: 35;
                        stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                        vengefulIndex: 20;
                    };
                };
            };
            consistency: {
                popularityPenalty: -5;
                warningMessage: "Your actions diverge from your stated leadership doctrine.";
                warningThresholdTurns: 3;
            };
            maxCustomRedLines: 3;
            sliderRange: { max: 100; min: 0 };
            vulnerabilities: {
                HealthRisk: {
                    description: "Leader has a chronic health condition. May be incapacitated for 2 turns.";
                    durationTurns: 2;
                    effect: "incapacitation";
                    label: "Health Risk";
                    triggerChancePerTurn: 0.03;
                };
                IdeologicalRigidity: {
                    description: "Cannot deviate from ideology without severe domestic backlash.";
                    effect: "backlash";
                    inconsistencyLoyaltyPenalty: -5;
                    inconsistencyPopularityPenalty: -8;
                    label: "Ideological Rigidity";
                };
                ScandalExposure: {
                    description: "Damaging personal information exists. If exposed, Popularity drops sharply.";
                    effect: "popularityDrop";
                    label: "Scandal Exposure";
                    popularityDelta: -20;
                    triggerChancePerTurn: 0.04;
                };
                SuccessionGap: {
                    description: "No clear successor. If leader removed, faction suffers 5 turns of instability.";
                    durationTurns: 5;
                    effect: "instability";
                    label: "Succession Gap";
                    stabilityPenaltyPerTurn: -5;
                };
            };
            vulnerabilityEvents: { earliestTriggerTurn: 5; maxTriggersPerGame: 1 };
        };
        marketReactions: {
            maxInflationDeltaPerTurn: 15;
            triggerCooldownTurns: 2;
            triggers: {
                hormuz: { inflationDelta: 5; keyword: "Strait of Hormuz" };

            };

        military: {
            doctrines: {
                a2ad: {
                    defenseBonus: 0.3;
                    description: "Anti-Access/Area Denial: +30% defense within first island chain.";
                    factionId: "China";
                    label: "A2/AD";
                    qualifier: "islandChain";
                };

                    factionId: "Iran";
                    label: "Asymmetric Swarm";
                    qualifier: "littoralHex";
                };
                collectiveDefense: {

                    factionId: "EU";

                };

            };
            civilWarExpanded: {
                economicGrowthMultiplier: -0.5;
                maxSplitFactions: 3;
                militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -10;
                minSplitFactions: 2;
                stabilityDecayPerTurn: -10;
                treasurySplitEqual: true;
            };
            coupAttempt: {
                militaryThreshold: 30;
                militaryWeight: 0.3;
                popularityWeight: 0.2;
                securityServicesThreshold: 30;
                securityServicesWeight: 0.3;
            };
            curfew: { economicActivityMultiplier: 0.5 };
            escalationThresholds: {
                civilWarMax: 100;
                civilWarMin: 81;
                grumblingMax: 20;
                insurrectionMax: 80;
                insurrectionMin: 61;
                protestsMax: 40;
                protestsMin: 21;
                riotsMax: 60;
                riotsMin: 41;
            };
            ethnicFunding: {
                hostileActionTensionIncrease: 8;
                maxFundingBoostPerTurn: 10;
                tensionPerCovertUnit: 0.15;
            };
            foreignPropaganda: { covertMultiplier: 0.1 };
            inequality: {
                growthRate: 3;
                growthThreshold: 2;
                max: 100;
                min: 0;
                socialSpendingEffect: -0.5;
            };
            insurrectionEffects: {
                militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -5;
                stabilityDecayPerTurn: -5;
            };
            insurrectionExpanded: {
                armedFactionsSpawned: 2;
                armedFactionStrength: 40;
                hexControlLossPerTurn: 3;
                militaryDiversionCost: -5;
            };
            martialLaw: {
                coupRiskMilitaryThreshold: 50;
                economicGrowthReduction: -0.3;
                popularityDecayPerTurn: -20;
                tensionIncreaseAllFactions: 10;
                unrestReduction: -30;
            };
            mediaManipulation: {
                baseSuccessProbability: 0.3;
                diCost: 5;
                foreignPropagandaRisk: 5;
                pressFreedomModifier: 0.005;
            };
            policeDeployment: { backlashIncrease: 5; unrestReduction: -10 };
            protestsEffects: {
                economicGrowthDecayPerTurn: -1;
                popularityDecayPerTurn: -2;
            };
            regimeChange: {
                civilUnrestThreshold: 100;
                personalityRandomizationRange: 20;
                stabilityThreshold: 0;
                successionClarityThreshold: 60;
                successorPowerBaseReduction: 20;
            };
            repressionBacklashThreshold: 50;
            riotsEffects: {
                moraleHitInRiotHex: -10;
                stabilityDecayPerTurn: -3;
                tourismFDIReduction: -0.2;
            };
        };
        technology: {
            aiAmplification: { intelligenceEffectivenessPerTenAI: 0.01 };
            aiThresholds: {
                aiArmsRaceEscalationMultiplier: 2;
                aiArmsRaceThreshold: 80;
                autonomousDrones: 50;
                autonomousDronesMilitaryBonus: 0.1;
                predictiveIntel: 70;
                predictiveIntelReliabilityBonus: 0.2;
                strategicAI: 90;
                strategicAIConfidenceImprovement: 0.3;
            };
            decay: { decayAmount: -1; decayIntervalTurns: 5 };
            dualUseDilemma: {
                accordsLegitimacyBonus: 10;
                aiTrigger: 60;
                biotechTrigger: 60;
                refusalLegitimacyPenalty: -5;
                secretViolationLegitimacyPenalty: -25;
            };
            espionage: {
                discoveryLegitimacyPenalty: -10;
                discoveryTensionIncrease: 20;
                levelBonus: 5;
            };
            exportControl: {
                multilateralInvestmentCostIncrease: 0.5;
                unilateralDICost: -3;
            };
            investment: { baseCostPerLevel: 10; exponentialThreshold: 50 };
            quantum: {
                intelBonusVsLowQuantum: 0.3;
                qreCyberRequirement: 60;
                qreQuantumRequirement: 50;
                threatThreshold: 70;
            };
            semiconductorChokepoint: { productionControlThreshold: 0.5 };
            techDecoupling: {
                crossBlocCyberBonus: 0.15;
                globalGDPPenalty: -0.01;
                intraBlocIntelBonus: 0.1;
                mutualExportControlThreshold: 60;
                nonAlignedCostMultiplier: 1.5;
            };
        };
        tutorial: {
            advisoryOverlayTurns: 3;
            autoSkipAfterGames: 1;
            hotkeys: {
                actionMenu: "a";
                diplomacyPanel: "d";
                endTurn: "Enter";
                intelligencePanel: "i";
                loadGame: "ctrl+l";
                saveGame: "ctrl+s";
                strategicDashboard: "Tab";
            };
        };
        unResolutions: {
            condemnation: {
                diPenalty: -10;
                durationTurns: 6;
                legitimacyPenalty: -15;
            };
            passingThreshold: 0.5;
            peacekeeping: {
                civilUnrestReduction: -15;
                diCostToProposer: -5;
                durationTurns: 8;
                stabilityBonus: 10;
            };
            sanctions: {
                durationTurns: 12;
                gdpGrowthPenalty: -0.15;
                legitimacyPenalty: -10;
                tradeReduction: 0.2;
            };
            votingWeights: {
                legitimacyImpact: 0.2;
                relationshipWithProposer: 0.3;
                relationshipWithTarget: 0.3;
                strategicInterest: 0.2;
            };
        };
        victoryLoss: {
            vc01_hegemonicDominance: {
                consecutiveTurns: 6;
                diplomaticInfluenceMin: 70;
                militaryReadinessMin: 60;
                stabilityMin: 80;
            };
            vc02_economicSupremacy: {
                consecutiveTurns: 12;
                rivalCountForComparison: 2;
            };
            vc03_pax: { consecutiveTurns: 12; tensionMax: 20 };
            vc04_governmentCollapse: {
                civilUnrestTrigger: 100;
                stabilityTrigger: 0;
                successionClarityThreshold: 60;
            };
            vc05_nuclearWinter: {
                nuclearThresholdTrigger: 100;
                secondStrikeProbability: 0.9;
            };
            vc06_isolation: { consecutiveTurns: 6; tensionMin: 80 };
            vc07_survival: {
                scoreWeights: { diplomaticInfluence: 1; gdp: 1; stability: 1 };
            };
            vc08_coup: {
                powerBaseMilitaryMax: 30;
                powerBaseSecurityMax: 30;
                successionClarityThreshold: 60;
            };
            vc09_peoplesRevolution: { civilUnrestTrigger: 100 };
            vc10_ironFist: {
                civilUnrestFloor: 40;
                requiredTurns: 60;
                stabilityCeiling: 50;
            };
            vc11_grandStrategist: {
                eligibleBaseVictories: readonly ["VC-01", "VC-02", "VC-03", "VC-10"];
                requiredGrade: "S";
            };
            vc12_puppetMaster: {
                discoveryAllowed: false;
                emotionalThreshold: 70;
                minManipulatedLeaders: 3;
            };
            vc13_unbreakable: {
                finalResolveMin: 80;
                finalStabilityMin: 60;
                minTraumaEvents: 3;
            };
            vc14_informationHegemon: {
                consecutiveTurns: 12;
                legitimacyMin: 90;
                maxSuccessfulDeepfakes: 0;
                minNarrativeBattleWins: 5;
            };
            vc15_shadowEmperor: {
                maxDirectCombatActions: 0;
                minStrategicObjectives: 3;
            };
            vc16_techSingularity: {
                aiMin: 90;
                quantumMin: 70;
                semiconductorsMin: 80;
                stabilityMin: 60;
            };
            vc17_resourceLord: {
                diplomaticInfluenceMin: 70;
                maxMilitaryCoercionActions: 0;
                minResourceCategories: 2;
                resourceControlThreshold: 50;
            };
        };
        visualization: {
            narrativeReplayMaxEntries: 100;
            proxyGraphMaxNodes: 50;
            resourceCriticalThreshold: 20;
            sanctionsTimelineMaxPoints: 60;
            techDashboardRefreshInterval: 1;
        };
    } = ...

    Engine barrel export — Simulation engines (game loop, AI, economy, etc.)

    Type Declaration

    • Readonlyadvisory: {
          compositeStrategy: {
              consistencyWeight: 0.3;
              lossMarginWeight: 0.3;
              topViabilityWeight: 0.4;
          };
          consistencyWindow: 6;
          driftPenalty: {
              consistencyThreshold: 0.3;
              effectivenessPenalty: -0.05;
              popularityDecayPerTurn: -2;
          };
          focusBonus: { consistencyThreshold: 0.7; effectivenessBonus: 0.05 };
          gradeThresholds: { A: 75; B: 60; C: 45; D: 30; S: 90 };
          grandStrategyPresets: {
              adaptive: "Adaptive";
              diplomaticBroker: "DiplomaticBroker";
              economicHegemon: "EconomicHegemon";
              militarySuperpower: "MilitarySuperpower";
              survivalMode: "SurvivalMode";
          };
          lossWarning: {
              critical: 3;
              criticalPercentage: 0.1;
              warning: 6;
              watch: 12;
          };
          pivotDetection: { consecutiveTurnsThreshold: 2 };
          projectionHorizons: { endgame: 60; immediate: 3; mediumTerm: 12 };
          rivalTrajectory: {
              clarityThreshold: 50;
              highClarityAccuracyBand: 3;
              lowClarityAccuracyBand: 8;
          };
          viabilityLabels: {
              difficultMax: 30;
              difficultMin: 10;
              favorableMax: 80;
              favorableMin: 61;
              foreclosedMax: 9;
              imminentMax: 100;
              imminentMin: 81;
              viableMax: 60;
              viableMin: 31;
          };
      }
      • ReadonlycompositeStrategy: { consistencyWeight: 0.3; lossMarginWeight: 0.3; topViabilityWeight: 0.4 }

        Composite strategy formula weights.

        See

        FR-1413

        • ReadonlyconsistencyWeight: 0.3

          Weight of strategy consistency.

          See

          FR-1413

        • ReadonlylossMarginWeight: 0.3

          Weight of loss margin.

          See

          FR-1413

        • ReadonlytopViabilityWeight: 0.4

          Weight of top viability score.

          See

          FR-1413

      • ReadonlyconsistencyWindow: 6

        Strategy consistency window in turns.

        See

        FR-1413

      • ReadonlydriftPenalty: {
            consistencyThreshold: 0.3;
            effectivenessPenalty: -0.05;
            popularityDecayPerTurn: -2;
        }

        Drift penalty when consistency < 30%.

        See

        FR-1414

        • ReadonlyconsistencyThreshold: 0.3

          Consistency threshold for drift penalty.

          See

          FR-1414

        • ReadonlyeffectivenessPenalty: -0.05

          Effectiveness penalty from drift.

          See

          FR-1414

        • ReadonlypopularityDecayPerTurn: -2

          Popularity decay per turn from drift.

          See

          FR-1414

      • ReadonlyfocusBonus: { consistencyThreshold: 0.7; effectivenessBonus: 0.05 }

        Focus bonus when consistency > 70%.

        See

        FR-1414

        • ReadonlyconsistencyThreshold: 0.7

          Consistency threshold for focus bonus.

          See

          FR-1414

        • ReadonlyeffectivenessBonus: 0.05

          Effectiveness bonus from focus.

          See

          FR-1414

      • ReadonlygradeThresholds: { A: 75; B: 60; C: 45; D: 30; S: 90 }

        Strategy grade thresholds (minimum score for each grade).

        See

        FR-1410

        • ReadonlyA: 75

          Minimum composite score for A grade.

          See

          FR-1410

        • ReadonlyB: 60

          Minimum composite score for B grade.

          See

          FR-1410

        • ReadonlyC: 45

          Minimum composite score for C grade.

          See

          FR-1410

        • ReadonlyD: 30

          Minimum composite score for D grade.

          See

          FR-1410

        • ReadonlyS: 90

          Minimum composite score for S grade.

          See

          FR-1410

            adaptive: "Adaptive";

            militarySuperpower: "MilitarySuperpower";
            survivalMode: "SurvivalMode";

      • ReadonlylossWarning: { critical: 3; criticalPercentage: 0.1; warning: 6; watch: 12 }

        Loss warning urgency thresholds (in turns).

        See

        FR-1403

        • Readonlycritical: 3

          Critical-level warning: turns remaining.

          See

          FR-1403

        • ReadonlycriticalPercentage: 0.1

          Critical-level percentage trigger.

          See

          FR-1403

        • Readonlywarning: 6

          Warning-level warning: turns remaining.

          See

          FR-1403

        • Readonlywatch: 12

          Watch-level warning: turns remaining.

          See

          FR-1403

      • ReadonlypivotDetection: { consecutiveTurnsThreshold: 2 }

        Strategic pivot detection thresholds.

        See

        FR-1406

        • ReadonlyconsecutiveTurnsThreshold: 2

          Consecutive turns top path must change before pivot fires.

          See

          FR-1406

      • ReadonlyprojectionHorizons: { endgame: 60; immediate: 3; mediumTerm: 12 }

        Projection time horizons (in turns).

        See

        FR-1402

        • Readonlyendgame: 60

          Endgame projection: remaining turns (up to 60).

          See

          FR-1402

        • Readonlyimmediate: 3

          Immediate-term projection horizon in turns.

          See

          FR-1402

        • ReadonlymediumTerm: 12

          Medium-term projection horizon in turns.

          See

          FR-1402

      • ReadonlyrivalTrajectory: { clarityThreshold: 50; highClarityAccuracyBand: 3; lowClarityAccuracyBand: 8 }

        Rival trajectory fog-accuracy bands (±turns).

        See

        FR-1405

        • ReadonlyclarityThreshold: 50

          Clarity threshold separating high from low accuracy.

          See

          FR-1405

        • ReadonlyhighClarityAccuracyBand: 3

          Accuracy band for high-clarity rivals (±turns).

          See

          FR-1405

        • ReadonlylowClarityAccuracyBand: 8

          Accuracy band for low-clarity rivals (±turns).

          See

          FR-1405

    • ReadonlyaiDecision: {
          desperationModeStabilityThreshold: 20;
          difficultyScaling: {
              aggressive: { aggression: 1.5; riskTolerance: 1.5 };
              balanced: { aggression: 1; riskTolerance: 1 };
              cautious: { aggression: 0.5; riskTolerance: 0.5 };
          };
      }
      • ReadonlydesperationModeStabilityThreshold: 20

        Stability threshold below which AI enters Desperation Mode.

        See

        FR-301

      • ReadonlydifficultyScaling: {
            aggressive: { aggression: 1.5; riskTolerance: 1.5 };
            balanced: { aggression: 1; riskTolerance: 1 };
            cautious: { aggression: 0.5; riskTolerance: 0.5 };
        }

        Difficulty scaling profiles.

        See

        FR-305

        • Readonlyaggressive: { aggression: 1.5; riskTolerance: 1.5 }

          Aggressive difficulty profile — high aggression and risk.

          See

          FR-305

          • Readonlyaggression: 1.5

            Aggression scalar.

            See

            FR-305

          • ReadonlyriskTolerance: 1.5

            Risk tolerance scalar.

            See

            FR-305

        • Readonlybalanced: { aggression: 1; riskTolerance: 1 }

          Balanced difficulty profile — default values.

          See

          FR-305

          • Readonlyaggression: 1

            Aggression scalar.

            See

            FR-305

          • ReadonlyriskTolerance: 1

            Risk tolerance scalar.

            See

            FR-305

        • Readonlycautious: { aggression: 0.5; riskTolerance: 0.5 }

          Cautious difficulty profile — low aggression and risk.

          See

          FR-305

          • Readonlyaggression: 0.5

            Aggression scalar.

            See

            FR-305

          • ReadonlyriskTolerance: 0.5

            Risk tolerance scalar.

            See

            FR-305

    • ReadonlyaiDifficulty: {
          aggressive: {
              aggressionMultiplier: 1.8;
              diplomaticPreferenceMultiplier: 0.6;
              economicFocusMultiplier: 0.7;
              riskToleranceMultiplier: 1.5;
          };
          balanced: {
              aggressionMultiplier: 1;
              diplomaticPreferenceMultiplier: 1;
              economicFocusMultiplier: 1;
              riskToleranceMultiplier: 1;
          };
          cautious: {
              aggressionMultiplier: 0.5;
              diplomaticPreferenceMultiplier: 1.2;
              economicFocusMultiplier: 1.3;
              riskToleranceMultiplier: 0.6;
          };
      }

            aggressionMultiplier: 1.8;
            diplomaticPreferenceMultiplier: 0.6;

    • Readonlycombat: {
          lowReadiness: { combatEffectivenessPenalty: -0.25; threshold: 30 };
          morale: {
              highMoraleBonus: 0.1;
              highThreshold: 70;
              lowMoralePenalty: -0.15;
              lowThreshold: 30;
          };
          readinessDecay: {
              activeOperationsDecayPerTurn: -2;
              lowTreasuryDecayPerTurn: -1;
          };
          supplyLine: { intactBonus: 0.1; severedPenalty: -0.2 };
          techDifferential: { bonusPerLevel: 0.05; maxBonus: 0.25 };
          terrainModifiers: {
              arctic: { attackerLogisticsPenalty: -0.15; attritionPerTurn: -0.05 };
              coastal: { navalBombardmentBonus: 0.15 };
              desert: { attackerLogisticsPenalty: -0.1 };
              forest: { defenseBonus: 0.15 };
              island: { requiresNavalSupremacy: true };
              mountain: { defenseBonus: 0.3 };
              plains: { attackBonus: 0.1 };
              urban: { causesCivilianCasualties: true; defenseBonus: 0.2 };
          };
      }
      • ReadonlylowReadiness: { combatEffectivenessPenalty: -0.25; threshold: 30 }

        Low readiness combat penalty.

        See

        FR-1004

        • ReadonlycombatEffectivenessPenalty: -0.25

          Combat effectiveness penalty when below readiness threshold.

          See

          FR-1004

        • Readonlythreshold: 30

          Readiness below this threshold incurs combat penalties.

          See

          FR-1004

      • Readonlymorale: {
            highMoraleBonus: 0.1;
            highThreshold: 70;
            lowMoralePenalty: -0.15;
            lowThreshold: 30;
        }

        Morale combat modifier.

        See

        FR-1105

        • ReadonlyhighMoraleBonus: 0.1

          Combat bonus from high morale.

          See

          FR-1105

        • ReadonlyhighThreshold: 70

          Morale threshold above which bonus applies.

          See

          FR-1105

        • ReadonlylowMoralePenalty: -0.15

          Combat penalty from low morale.

          See

          FR-1105

        • ReadonlylowThreshold: 30

          Morale threshold below which penalty applies.

          See

          FR-1105

      • ReadonlyreadinessDecay: { activeOperationsDecayPerTurn: -2; lowTreasuryDecayPerTurn: -1 }

        Readiness decay rates.

        See

        FR-1004

        • ReadonlyactiveOperationsDecayPerTurn: -2

          Readiness decay per turn during active operations.

          See

          FR-1004

        • ReadonlylowTreasuryDecayPerTurn: -1

          Readiness decay per turn when treasury is low.

          See

          FR-1004

      • ReadonlysupplyLine: { intactBonus: 0.1; severedPenalty: -0.2 }

        Supply line combat modifier.

        See

        FR-1105

        • ReadonlyintactBonus: 0.1

          Bonus when supply lines are intact.

          See

          FR-1105

        • ReadonlyseveredPenalty: -0.2

          Penalty when supply lines are severed.

          See

          FR-1105

      • ReadonlytechDifferential: { bonusPerLevel: 0.05; maxBonus: 0.25 }

        Tech level differential combat modifier.

        See

        FR-1105

        • ReadonlybonusPerLevel: 0.05

          Combat bonus per tech-level advantage.

          See

          FR-1105

        • ReadonlymaxBonus: 0.25

          Maximum tech-level combat modifier.

          See

          FR-1105

      • ReadonlyterrainModifiers: {
            arctic: { attackerLogisticsPenalty: -0.15; attritionPerTurn: -0.05 };
            coastal: { navalBombardmentBonus: 0.15 };
            desert: { attackerLogisticsPenalty: -0.1 };

            mountain: { defenseBonus: 0.3 };
            plains: { attackBonus: 0.1 };
            urban: { causesCivilianCasualties: true; defenseBonus: 0.2 };

                  intelBonusMax: 15;

              };

                  diCost: 5;

        • ReadonlydefensePact: {
              breachCredibilityPenalty: -30;
              defaultDuration: 0;
              diCost: 15;
              militaryReadinessBonus: 5;
              minTrust: 40;
          }

          Defense Pact config.

          See

          FR-701

          • ReadonlybreachCredibilityPenalty: -30

            Credibility cost for breaking.

          • ReadonlydefaultDuration: 0

            Default duration in turns.

          • ReadonlydiCost: 15

            DI cost for proposer.

          • ReadonlymilitaryReadinessBonus: 5

            Military readiness bonus while active.

          • ReadonlyminTrust: 40

            Minimum trust to propose.

            See

            FR-1509

        • ReadonlyintelSharing: {
              defaultDuration: 8;
              diCost: 12;
              intelBonusMax: 15;
              intelBonusMin: 10;
              minTrust: 60;

          See

          FR-701

          • ReadonlydefaultDuration: 8

            Default duration in turns.

          • ReadonlydiCost: 12

            DI cost for proposer.

          • ReadonlyintelBonusMax: 15

            Intel sub-score bonus to weaker partner max.

            See

            FR-905

          • ReadonlyintelBonusMin: 10

            Intel sub-score bonus to weaker partner.

            See

            FR-905

          • ReadonlyminTrust: 60

            Minimum trust to propose.

            See

            FR-1509

        • Readonlynap: {
              defaultDuration: 0;
              diCost: 5;
              minTrust: 20;
              stabilityBonusPerTurn: 1;
              tensionReduction: -10;
          }

          Non-Aggression Pact config.

          See

          FR-701

          • ReadonlydefaultDuration: 0

            Default duration in turns (0 = indefinite until broken).

          • ReadonlydiCost: 5

            DI cost for proposer.

          • ReadonlyminTrust: 20

            Minimum trust to propose.

            See

            FR-1509

          • ReadonlystabilityBonusPerTurn: 1

            Stability bonus while active (per turn).

          • ReadonlytensionReduction: -10

            Tension reduction between signatories.

              defaultDuration: 10;
              diCost: 8;

          • ReadonlydiCost: 8

            DI cost for proposer.

          • ReadonlygdpBonusPerTurn: 0.005

            GDP growth bonus per turn while active.

          • ReadonlyminTrust: 15

            Minimum trust to propose.

          • ReadonlytreasuryBonusPerTurn: 2

            Treasury income bonus per turn.

      • Readonlycredibility: {
            acceptanceMultiplierPerPoint: 0.005;
            autoRejectThreshold: 20;
            betrayedStabilityPenalty: -5;
            breachDiPenalty: -5;
            defensePactBreachPenalty: -30;
            initialValue: 75;
            intelSharingBreachPenalty: -20;
            max: 100;
            min: 0;
            napBreachPenalty: -15;
            passiveRecoveryPerTurn: 1;
            recoveryGracePeriod: 5;
            tradeDealBreachPenalty: -10;
            trustedAllyAcceptanceBonus: 0.2;
            trustedAllyThreshold: 80;
        }

        Alliance Credibility system.

        See

        FR-702

        • ReadonlyacceptanceMultiplierPerPoint: 0.005

          Credibility multiplier on future proposal acceptance.

        • ReadonlyautoRejectThreshold: 20

          Credibility below which all proposals auto-rejected.

        • ReadonlybetrayedStabilityPenalty: -5

          Stability penalty from being betrayed.

        • ReadonlybreachDiPenalty: -5

          DI penalty per breach event (global reputation).

        • ReadonlydefensePactBreachPenalty: -30

          Credibility penalty for breaking a Defense Pact.

        • ReadonlyinitialValue: 75

          Initial credibility for all factions.

        • ReadonlyintelSharingBreachPenalty: -20

          Credibility penalty for breaking Intel Sharing.

        • Readonlymax: 100

          Maximum credibility value.

        • Readonlymin: 0

          Minimum credibility value.

        • ReadonlynapBreachPenalty: -15

          Credibility penalty for breaking a NAP.

        • ReadonlypassiveRecoveryPerTurn: 1

          Passive credibility recovery per turn (if no breaches).

        • ReadonlyrecoveryGracePeriod: 5

          Turns since last breach before recovery begins.

        • ReadonlytradeDealBreachPenalty: -10

          Credibility penalty for breaking a Trade Deal.

        • ReadonlytrustedAllyAcceptanceBonus: 0.2

          Bonus acceptance probability at trusted ally level.

        • ReadonlytrustedAllyThreshold: 80

          Credibility threshold for "trusted ally" status.

      • Readonlyutility: {
            acceptanceThreshold: 0.5;
            chemistryWeight: 0.15;
            economicBenefitWeight: 0.15;
            ideologicalOppositionPenalty: -0.2;
            maxSimultaneousAgreements: 3;
            militaryBalanceWeight: 0.15;
            nationalInterestWeight: 0.25;
            sharedEnemyBonus: 0.15;
            trustWeight: 0.3;
        }

        AI utility evaluation weights for proposal acceptance.

        See

        FR-701

        • ReadonlyacceptanceThreshold: 0.5

          Base acceptance threshold (utility must exceed).

        • ReadonlychemistryWeight: 0.15

          Weight of leader chemistry in utility calculation.

        • ReadonlyeconomicBenefitWeight: 0.15

          Weight of economic benefit.

        • ReadonlyideologicalOppositionPenalty: -0.2

          Penalty from ideological opposition.

        • ReadonlymaxSimultaneousAgreements: 3

          Maximum number of simultaneous active agreements per faction pair.

        • ReadonlymilitaryBalanceWeight: 0.15

          Weight of military balance (power parity).

        • ReadonlynationalInterestWeight: 0.25

          Weight of national interest alignment.

        • ReadonlysharedEnemyBonus: 0.15

          Bonus to acceptance from shared enemies.

        • ReadonlytrustWeight: 0.3

          Weight of trust in utility calculation.

    • ReadonlydoubleAgent: {
          covertBonusPerPoint: 0.005;
          detectionMultiplier: 0.01;
          disinformationDurationTurns: 4;
          expulsionTensionIncrease: 10;
          falsePactsPerTurn: 1;
          ghostUnitsPerTurn: 2;
          minCounterIntelToTurn: 40;
          turnSuccessBase: 0.5;
      }
      • ReadonlycovertBonusPerPoint: 0.005

        COVERT bonus per point above 50.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlydetectionMultiplier: 0.01

        Detection probability: counterIntel * this multiplier.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlydisinformationDurationTurns: 4

        Duration (turns) that disinformation persists.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlyexpulsionTensionIncrease: 10

        Expulsion penalty: tension increase.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlyfalsePactsPerTurn: 1

        Number of false pacts injected per successful turn.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlyghostUnitsPerTurn: 2

        Number of ghost units injected per successful turn.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlyminCounterIntelToTurn: 40

        Minimum counter-intel score to attempt turning.

        See

        FR-906

      • ReadonlyturnSuccessBase: 0.5

        Turn success probability base (modified by COVERT score).

        See

        FR-906

        • Readonlycomprehensive: {
              civilUnrestPerTurn: 5;
              gdpDecayPerTurn: -0.05;
              legitimacyCostIfWeakTarget: -5;
              treasuryHit: -0.4;
          }

          Comprehensive sanctions.

          See

          FR-1702

          • ReadonlycivilUnrestPerTurn: 5

            Civil unrest increase per turn on target.

            See

            FR-1702

          • ReadonlygdpDecayPerTurn: -0.05

            GDP decay per turn on target.

            See

            FR-1702

          • ReadonlylegitimacyCostIfWeakTarget: -5

            Legitimacy cost to sender if target is weak.

            See

            FR-1702

          • ReadonlytreasuryHit: -0.4

            Treasury hit on target.

            See

            FR-1702

        • Readonlysectoral: { gdpDecayPerTurnPerSector: -0.02; ownTradeReduction: -0.5 }

          Sectoral sanctions.

          See

          FR-1702

          • ReadonlygdpDecayPerTurnPerSector: -0.02

            GDP decay per turn per sanctioned sector.

            See

            FR-1702

          • ReadonlyownTradeReduction: -0.5

            Own trade reduction (blowback).

            See

            FR-1702

        • Readonlytargeted: { diCost: -3; oligarchsHit: -10 }

          Targeted sanctions.

          See

          FR-1702

          • ReadonlydiCost: -3

            DI cost to impose.

            See

            FR-1702

          • ReadonlyoligarchsHit: -10

            Oligarch power-base hit.

            See

            FR-1702

      • ReadonlysecondarySanctions: {
            diThreshold: 70;

          FR-1703

          FR-1703

          FR-1703

        • ReadonlylegitimacyCost: -5

          See

          FR-1701

        • ReadonlycoalitionGDPThreshold: 0.6

          See

          FR-1701

        • ReadonlydiThreshold: 60

          Diplomatic Influence threshold required to initiate.

          See

          FR-1701

        • ReadonlygdpDecayPerTurn: -0.05

          GDP decay per turn on target.

          See

          FR-1701

        • ReadonlytradeIncomeReduction: -0.7

          Trade income reduction on target.

          See

          FR-1701

      • ReadonlywarEconomy: {
            civilUnrestPerTurn: 3;
            exhaustionGDPDecay: -0.02;
            exhaustionTurnThreshold: 12;
            gdpGrowthFreeze: 0;
            legitimacyCost: -5;
            militaryProductionBoost: 0.3;
            recessionDuration: 3;
            recessionGDPDecay: -0.03;
            treasuryMobilizationBoost: 0.2;
        }

        See

        FR-1707

        • ReadonlycivilUnrestPerTurn: 3

          Civil unrest per turn during war economy.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlyexhaustionGDPDecay: -0.02

          GDP decay per turn after exhaustion.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlyexhaustionTurnThreshold: 12

          Turns before exhaustion effects begin.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlygdpGrowthFreeze: 0

          GDP growth freeze (set to 0).

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlylegitimacyCost: -5

          Legitimacy cost of war economy declaration.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlymilitaryProductionBoost: 0.3

          Military production boost.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlyrecessionDuration: 3

          Duration of post-war recession in turns.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlyrecessionGDPDecay: -0.03

          GDP decay per turn during recession.

          See

          FR-1707

        • ReadonlytreasuryMobilizationBoost: 0.2

          See

          FR-1707

    • ReadonlygreyZone: {
          cyberOps: {
              effectDurationTurns: 3;
              gdpGrowthReduction: 0.02;
              maxConcurrentOps: 2;
              militaryReadinessReduction: 8;
              minCyberCapability: 30;
              treasuryCost: 20;
          };
          discovery: {
              baseChance: 0.1;
              covertModifier: 0.005;
              legitimacyPenaltyOnDiscovery: -10;
              targetStabilityBoostOnDiscovery: 3;
              tensionSpikeOnDiscovery: 15;
          };
          insurgency: {
              baseDiscoveryChance: 0.15;
              maxConcurrentInsurgencies: 3;
              minDIToInitiate: 20;
              rampUpTurns: 1;
              stabilityReductionPerTurn: 3;
              treasuryCostPerTurn: 15;
          };
          maritimeMilitia: {
              maxFleetUnits: 5;
              noWarTriggerThreshold: true;
              tensionIncreasePerTurn: 3;
              tradeDisruptionPercent: 0.25;
              treasuryCostPerTurn: 10;
          };
      }
      • ReadonlycyberOps: {
            effectDurationTurns: 3;
            gdpGrowthReduction: 0.02;
            maxConcurrentOps: 2;
            militaryReadinessReduction: 8;
            minCyberCapability: 30;
            treasuryCost: 20;
        }

        Cyber operations mechanics.

        See

        FR-403

        • ReadonlyeffectDurationTurns: 3

          Duration of cyber ops effect in turns.

          See

          FR-403

        • ReadonlygdpGrowthReduction: 0.02

          GDP growth reduction from cyber attack.

          See

          FR-403

        • ReadonlymaxConcurrentOps: 2

          Maximum concurrent cyber ops per faction.

          See

          FR-403

        • ReadonlymilitaryReadinessReduction: 8

          Military readiness reduction from cyber attack.

          See

          FR-403

        • ReadonlyminCyberCapability: 30

          Minimum cyber capability (0–100) required to launch.

          See

          FR-403

        • ReadonlytreasuryCost: 20

          Treasury cost to launch a cyber operation.

          See

          FR-403

      • Readonlydiscovery: {
            baseChance: 0.1;
            covertModifier: 0.005;
            legitimacyPenaltyOnDiscovery: -10;
            targetStabilityBoostOnDiscovery: 3;
            tensionSpikeOnDiscovery: 15;
        }

        Discovery probability mechanics.

        See

        FR-404

        • ReadonlybaseChance: 0.1

          Base discovery chance. Actual = base + (100 - covert) × covertModifier.

          See

          FR-404

        • ReadonlycovertModifier: 0.005

          Modifier applied to (100 - covert) for discovery calculation.

          See

          FR-404

        • ReadonlylegitimacyPenaltyOnDiscovery: -10

          Legitimacy penalty on discovery.

          See

          FR-404

        • ReadonlytargetStabilityBoostOnDiscovery: 3

          Stability boost to target (rally-around-flag effect).

          See

          FR-404

        • ReadonlytensionSpikeOnDiscovery: 15

          Tension increase on discovery.

          See

          FR-404

      • Readonlyinsurgency: {
            baseDiscoveryChance: 0.15;
            maxConcurrentInsurgencies: 3;
            minDIToInitiate: 20;
            rampUpTurns: 1;
            stabilityReductionPerTurn: 3;
            treasuryCostPerTurn: 15;
        }

        Covert insurgency funding mechanics.

        See

        FR-401

        • ReadonlybaseDiscoveryChance: 0.15

          Base discovery chance per turn (0–1).

          See

          FR-401

        • ReadonlymaxConcurrentInsurgencies: 3

          Maximum concurrent insurgencies a faction can fund.

          See

          FR-401

        • ReadonlyminDIToInitiate: 20

          Minimum DI required to initiate an insurgency.

          See

          FR-401

        • ReadonlyrampUpTurns: 1

          Turns before insurgency takes effect (ramp-up).

          See

          FR-401

        • ReadonlystabilityReductionPerTurn: 3

          Target stability reduction per turn while funded.

          See

          FR-401

        • ReadonlytreasuryCostPerTurn: 15

          Treasury cost to fund an insurgency per turn.

          See

          FR-401

      • ReadonlymaritimeMilitia: {
            maxFleetUnits: 5;
            noWarTriggerThreshold: true;
            tensionIncreasePerTurn: 3;
            tradeDisruptionPercent: 0.25;
            treasuryCostPerTurn: 10;
        }

        Maritime militia blockade mechanics.

        See

        FR-402

        • ReadonlymaxFleetUnits: 5

          Maximum fishing fleet units deployable per blockade.

          See

          FR-402

        • ReadonlynoWarTriggerThreshold: true

          Factions whose war-state is NOT triggered by fishing fleet blockades.

          See

          FR-402

        • ReadonlytensionIncreasePerTurn: 3

          Tension increase per turn of active blockade.

          See

          FR-402

        • ReadonlytradeDisruptionPercent: 0.25

          Trade disruption percentage from fishing fleet blockade.

          See

          FR-402

        • ReadonlytreasuryCostPerTurn: 10

          Treasury cost per turn to maintain blockade.

          See

          FR-402

    • Readonlyheadlines: {
          minEventsForHeadlines: 1;
          perspectiveBias: {
              intelligence: {
                  diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
                  domesticWeight: 0.1;
                  economicWeight: 0.1;
                  intelligenceWeight: 0.35;
                  militaryWeight: 0.3;
              };
              statePropaganda: {
                  diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
                  domesticWeight: 0.4;
                  economicWeight: 0.1;
                  intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
                  militaryWeight: 0.3;
              };
              westernPress: {
                  diplomaticWeight: 0.35;
                  domesticWeight: 0.05;
                  economicWeight: 0.3;
                  intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
                  militaryWeight: 0.25;
              };
          };
          toneMultipliers: {
              intelligenceDramaBoost: 0.8;
              statePropagandaDramaBoost: 1.4;
              westernPressDramaBoost: 1.2;
          };
      }
      • ReadonlyminEventsForHeadlines: 1

        Minimum events required to generate headlines for a turn.

        See

        FR-201

      • ReadonlyperspectiveBias: {
            intelligence: {
                diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
                domesticWeight: 0.1;
                economicWeight: 0.1;
                intelligenceWeight: 0.35;
                militaryWeight: 0.3;
            };
            statePropaganda: {
                diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
                domesticWeight: 0.4;
                economicWeight: 0.1;
                intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
                militaryWeight: 0.3;
            };
            westernPress: {
                diplomaticWeight: 0.35;
                domesticWeight: 0.05;
                economicWeight: 0.3;
                intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
                militaryWeight: 0.25;
            };
        }

        Event-category weight tables per perspective. Higher weight → more likely to be selected as headline topic.

        See

        FR-201

        • Readonlyintelligence: {
              diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
              domesticWeight: 0.1;
              economicWeight: 0.1;
              intelligenceWeight: 0.35;
              militaryWeight: 0.3;
          }

          Intelligence: emphasises military & intelligence signals.

          See

          FR-201

        • ReadonlystatePropaganda: {
              diplomaticWeight: 0.15;
              domesticWeight: 0.4;
              economicWeight: 0.1;
              intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
              militaryWeight: 0.3;
          }

          State Propaganda: emphasises domestic narrative & military.

          See

          FR-201

        • ReadonlywesternPress: {
              diplomaticWeight: 0.35;
              domesticWeight: 0.05;
              economicWeight: 0.3;
              intelligenceWeight: 0.05;
              militaryWeight: 0.25;
          }

          Western Press: emphasises diplomacy & economics.

          See

          FR-201

      • ReadonlytoneMultipliers: {
            intelligenceDramaBoost: 0.8;
            statePropagandaDramaBoost: 1.4;
            westernPressDramaBoost: 1.2;
        }

        Headline framing tone multipliers per perspective.

        See

        FR-201

        • ReadonlyintelligenceDramaBoost: 0.8

          Intelligence reports are more factual, less dramatic.

        • ReadonlystatePropagandaDramaBoost: 1.4

          State propaganda amplifies domestic/military events.

        • ReadonlywesternPressDramaBoost: 1.2

          Western press amplifies diplomatic/economic events.

    • ReadonlyinfoWar: {
          censorshipEffectiveness: {
              closedSystem: 0.95;
              fragmented: 0.3;
              freePress: 0.05;
              stateMedia: 0.7;
          };
          counterNarrativeEffectTurns: 1;
          counterNarrativeReductionFactor: 0.5;
          deepfake: {
              cyberThreshold: 60;
              detectionBackfire: {
                  deployerLegitimacyPenalty: -25;
                  trustPenaltyAllNations: -15;
              };
              fabricateStatements: { targetLegitimacyPenalty: -15 };
              fakeAtrocityEvidence: {
                  targetLegitimacyPenalty: -20;
                  targetUnrestBoost: 10;
              };
              syntheticIntelligence: { persistenceTurns: 3 };
              treasuryCost: -10;
          };
          fogOfIntent: {
              defaultProbabilities: {
                  attackPrep: 0.05;
                  defensive: 0.6;
                  exercise: 0.1;
                  signal: 0.25;
              };
              highAccuracyThreshold: 60;
              humintWeight: 0.6;
              lowAccuracyThreshold: 25;
              maxNoise: 0.25;
              minNoise: 0.03;
              misreadEscalationMultiplier: 1.5;
              psychProfileWeight: 0.4;
          };
          legitimacy: {
              blocksAlliances: 30;
              diplomaticBonusThreshold: 70;
              diplomaticEffectivenessBonus: 0.15;
          };
          mediaEcosystemDefaults: {
              closedSystem: {
                  censorshipEffectiveness: 95;
                  narrativeControlScore: 95;
                  propagandaResistance: 15;
                  viralityMultiplier: 0.2;
              };
              fragmented: {
                  censorshipEffectiveness: 30;
                  narrativeControlScore: 35;
                  propagandaResistance: 40;
                  viralityMultiplier: 1.2;
              };
              freePress: {
                  censorshipEffectiveness: 5;
                  narrativeControlScore: 20;
                  propagandaResistance: 70;
                  viralityMultiplier: 1.5;
              };
              stateMedia: {
                  censorshipEffectiveness: 70;
                  narrativeControlScore: 80;
                  propagandaResistance: 30;
                  viralityMultiplier: 0.6;
              };
          };
          narrativeBattle: {
              legitimacyWeight: 0.4;
              loserLegitimacyLoss: -5;
              mediaReachWeight: 0.3;
              narrativeInvestmentWeight: 0.3;
              winnerLegitimacyGain: 5;
          };
          narrativeCampaigns: {
              economicJustice: { diplomaticPenaltyReduction: 0.3 };
              historicalGrievance: {
                  angerBoost: 10;
                  legitimacyPenalty: -5;
                  nationalismBoost: 15;
              };
              liberation: { backfirePenalty: -15; legitimacyLossReduction: 0.5 };
              victimhood: { diCost: -5; nationalismBoost: 10; sympathyBoost: 5 };
          };
          platformPenetration: Record<string, number>;
          unResolutionPenalty: -10;
          viralityDecayPerTurn: 15;
          viralityFactors: { scandalBonus: 15; triumphBonus: 10; violenceBonus: 20 };
          whistleblower: {
              acknowledgePenalty: -10;
              divergenceThreshold: 30;
              exposureLegitimacyPenalty: -20;
              securityServicesReductionPer20: 0.1;
          };
          whistleblowerCascade: { additionalExposureRisk: 0.15; maxOpsExposed: 3 };
      }
      • ReadonlycensorshipEffectiveness: { closedSystem: 0.95; fragmented: 0.3; freePress: 0.05; stateMedia: 0.7 }

        Censorship effectiveness by media system type.

        See

        FR-1603

        • ReadonlyclosedSystem: 0.95

          Censorship effectiveness under closed system.

          See

          FR-1603

        • Readonlyfragmented: 0.3

          Censorship effectiveness under fragmented media.

          See

          FR-1603

        • ReadonlyfreePress: 0.05

          Censorship effectiveness under free press.

          See

          FR-1603

        • ReadonlystateMedia: 0.7

          Censorship effectiveness under state media.

          See

          FR-1603

      • ReadonlycounterNarrativeEffectTurns: 1

        Counter-narrative halves virality within this many turns.

        See

        FR-1603

      • ReadonlycounterNarrativeReductionFactor: 0.5

        Counter-narrative virality reduction factor (0.0–1.0).

        See

        FR-1603

            fakeAtrocityEvidence: {

                targetUnrestBoost: 10;

            syntheticIntelligence: { persistenceTurns: 3 };

        }

          FR-1604

            See

            FR-1604

          • ReadonlytrustPenaltyAllNations: -15

            See

            FR-1604

        • ReadonlyfabricateStatements: { targetLegitimacyPenalty: -15 }

          See

          FR-1604

          • ReadonlytargetLegitimacyPenalty: -15

            Legitimacy penalty applied to target.

            See

            FR-1604

        • ReadonlyfakeAtrocityEvidence: { targetLegitimacyPenalty: -20; targetUnrestBoost: 10 }

          Fake atrocity evidence.

          See

          FR-1604

          • ReadonlytargetLegitimacyPenalty: -20

            Legitimacy penalty applied to target.

            See

            FR-1604

          • ReadonlytargetUnrestBoost: 10

            Civil unrest boost on target.

            See

            FR-1604

        • ReadonlysyntheticIntelligence: { persistenceTurns: 3 }

          Synthetic intelligence planted in target pipeline.

          See

          FR-1604

          • ReadonlypersistenceTurns: 3

            See

            FR-1604

        • ReadonlytreasuryCost: -10

          See

          FR-1604

      • ReadonlyfogOfIntent: {
            defaultProbabilities: {
                attackPrep: 0.05;
                defensive: 0.6;
                exercise: 0.1;
                signal: 0.25;
            };
            highAccuracyThreshold: 60;
            humintWeight: 0.6;
            lowAccuracyThreshold: 25;
            maxNoise: 0.25;
            minNoise: 0.03;
            misreadEscalationMultiplier: 1.5;
            psychProfileWeight: 0.4;
        }

        Fog of Intent system.

        See

        FR-1608

        • ReadonlydefaultProbabilities: { attackPrep: 0.05; defensive: 0.6; exercise: 0.1; signal: 0.25 }

          Default probability distribution for unknown intent (sums to 1.0).

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlyhighAccuracyThreshold: 60

          HUMINT × PsychProfile product above which assessment is "high accuracy".

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlyhumintWeight: 0.6

          HUMINT weight in accuracy calculation.

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlylowAccuracyThreshold: 25

          HUMINT × PsychProfile product below which assessment is "low accuracy".

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlymaxNoise: 0.25

          Maximum noise added to probabilities at low accuracy.

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlyminNoise: 0.03

          Minimum noise added to probabilities at high accuracy.

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlymisreadEscalationMultiplier: 1.5

          Escalation risk multiplier when intent is misread.

          See

          FR-1608

        • ReadonlypsychProfileWeight: 0.4

          Psychological profile weight in accuracy calculation.

          See

          FR-1608

      • Readonlylegitimacy: {
            blocksAlliances: 30;
            diplomaticBonusThreshold: 70;
            diplomaticEffectivenessBonus: 0.15;
        }

        See

        FR-1601

        • ReadonlyblocksAlliances: 30

          Legitimacy at-or-below which alliances are blocked.

          See

          FR-1601

        • ReadonlydiplomaticBonusThreshold: 70

          Legitimacy above which diplomatic effectiveness bonus applies.

          See

          FR-1601

        • ReadonlydiplomaticEffectivenessBonus: 0.15

          Diplomatic effectiveness bonus at high legitimacy.

          See

          FR-1601

        FR-1606

        • ReadonlylegitimacyWeight: 0.4

          FR-1606

          See

          FR-1606

        • ReadonlymediaReachWeight: 0.3

          See

          FR-1606

        • ReadonlynarrativeInvestmentWeight: 0.3

          See

          FR-1606

        • ReadonlywinnerLegitimacyGain: 5

          See

          FR-1606

      • ReadonlynarrativeCampaigns: {

            historicalGrievance: {
