        • ReadonlyeconomicJustice: { diplomaticPenaltyReduction: 0.3 }

          Economic Justice narrative effects.

          See

          FR-1602

          • ReadonlydiplomaticPenaltyReduction: 0.3

            Reduction to diplomatic penalties.

            See

            FR-1602

        • ReadonlyhistoricalGrievance: { angerBoost: 10; legitimacyPenalty: -5; nationalismBoost: 15 }

          Historical Grievance narrative effects.

          See

          FR-1602

          • ReadonlyangerBoost: 10

            Leader anger boost.

            See

            FR-1602

          • ReadonlylegitimacyPenalty: -5

            Legitimacy penalty from grievance narrative.

            See

            FR-1602

          • ReadonlynationalismBoost: 15

            Nationalism boost.

            See

            FR-1602

        • Readonlyliberation: { backfirePenalty: -15; legitimacyLossReduction: 0.5 }

          Liberation narrative effects.

          See

          FR-1602

          • ReadonlybackfirePenalty: -15

            Backfire penalty if narrative fails.

            See

            FR-1602

          • ReadonlylegitimacyLossReduction: 0.5

            Legitimacy-loss reduction factor.

            See

            FR-1602

        • Readonlyvictimhood: { diCost: -5; nationalismBoost: 10; sympathyBoost: 5 }

          Victimhood narrative effects.

          See

          FR-1602

          • ReadonlydiCost: -5

            Diplomatic Influence cost.

            See

            FR-1602

          • ReadonlynationalismBoost: 10

            Nationalism boost.

            See

            FR-1602

          • ReadonlysympathyBoost: 5

            International sympathy boost.

            See

            FR-1602

      • ReadonlyplatformPenetration: Record<string, number>

        Platform penetration per faction (0.0–1.0).

        See

        FR-1603

      • ReadonlyunResolutionPenalty: -10

        UN Resolution condemning a nation.

        See

        FR-1601

      • ReadonlyviralityDecayPerTurn: 15

        Virality score decay per turn (absolute).

        See

        FR-1603

      • ReadonlyviralityFactors: { scandalBonus: 15; triumphBonus: 10; violenceBonus: 20 }

        Virality factor bonuses.

        See

        FR-1603

        • ReadonlyscandalBonus: 15

          Virality bonus for scandal-related content.

          See

          FR-1603

        • ReadonlytriumphBonus: 10

          Virality bonus for triumph-related content.

          See

          FR-1603

        • ReadonlyviolenceBonus: 20

          Virality bonus for violence-related content.

          See

          FR-1603

      • Readonlywhistleblower: {
            acknowledgePenalty: -10;
            divergenceThreshold: 30;
            exposureLegitimacyPenalty: -20;
            securityServicesReductionPer20: 0.1;
        }

        Whistleblower mechanics.

        See

        FR-1607

        • ReadonlyacknowledgePenalty: -10

          Legitimacy penalty from acknowledging wrongdoing.

          See

          FR-1607

        • ReadonlydivergenceThreshold: 30

          Actions-vs-narrative divergence threshold that triggers whistleblower.

          See

          FR-1607

        • ReadonlyexposureLegitimacyPenalty: -20

          Legitimacy penalty from exposure.

          See

          FR-1607

        • ReadonlysecurityServicesReductionPer20: 0.1

          Risk reduction per 20 spent on security services.

          See

          FR-1607

      • ReadonlywhistleblowerCascade: { additionalExposureRisk: 0.15; maxOpsExposed: 3 }

        Whistleblower cascade risk when suppressing.

        See

        FR-1607

        • ReadonlyadditionalExposureRisk: 0.15

          Additional exposure risk per suppression attempt.

          See

          FR-1607

        • ReadonlymaxOpsExposed: 3

          Max covert ops exposed per whistleblower event.

          See

          FR-1607

    • Readonlyintelligence: {
          blowback: { base: 100; difficultyModifier: 1 };
          blowbackConsequences: {
              diplomatExpulsion: -5;
              publicScandal: -10;
              tensionSpike: 15;
          };
          clarity: {
              base: 0;
              ghostUnitProbabilityBase: 0.3;
              ghostUnitThreshold: 30;
              headlineReliabilityReduction: 0.25;
              headlineReliabilityThreshold: 40;
              max: 100;
              min: 0;
          };
          operations: {
              counterintel: {
                  baseSuccessProbability: 0.6;
                  diCost: 4;
                  difficultyModifier: 0.3;
                  primarySubScore: "covert";
                  rivalClarityDecrease: 10;
              };
              gather: {
                  baseSuccessProbability: 0.5;
                  clarityIncrease: 10;
                  diCost: 3;
                  difficultyModifier: 0.5;
                  primarySubScore: "sigint";
              };
              recruitAsset: {
                  baseSuccessProbability: 0.35;
                  defaultLifespan: 0;
                  diCost: 8;
                  difficultyModifier: 0.8;
                  humintBonusPerTurn: 5;
                  primarySubScore: "humint";
              };
              sabotage: {
                  baseSuccessProbability: 0.4;
                  diCost: 6;
                  difficultyModifier: 1;
                  primarySubScore: "cyber";
                  targetStatReduction: -10;
                  validTargets: readonly ["stability", "militaryReadiness", "treasury"];
              };
          };
          sharing: { bonusMax: 15; bonusMin: 10; maxStrengthDiff: 50 };
          subScoreWeights: { covert: 0.2; cyber: 0.25; humint: 0.3; sigint: 0.25 };
      }
      • Readonlyblowback: { base: 100; difficultyModifier: 1 }

        Blowback formula: BlowbackChance = (100 - COVERT) * DifficultyModifier.

        See

        FR-904

        • Readonlybase: 100

          Base value from which COVERT is subtracted.

          See

          FR-904

        • ReadonlydifficultyModifier: 1

          Default difficulty modifier applied to blowback chance.

          See

          FR-904

      • ReadonlyblowbackConsequences: { diplomatExpulsion: -5; publicScandal: -10; tensionSpike: 15 }

        Blowback consequence magnitudes.

        See

        FR-904

        • ReadonlydiplomatExpulsion: -5

          Diplomat expulsion DI penalty.

          See

          FR-904

        • ReadonlypublicScandal: -10

          Public scandal legitimacy penalty.

          See

          FR-904

        • ReadonlytensionSpike: 15

          Tension spike from blowback.

          See

          FR-904

      • Readonlyclarity: {
            base: 0;
            ghostUnitProbabilityBase: 0.3;
            ghostUnitThreshold: 30;
            headlineReliabilityReduction: 0.25;
            headlineReliabilityThreshold: 40;
            max: 100;
            min: 0;
        }

        Fog of War clarity formula parameters.

        See

        FR-902

        • Readonlybase: 0

          Base clarity before intel modifiers.

        • ReadonlyghostUnitProbabilityBase: 0.3

          Ghost Unit spawn probability per turn at low clarity.

          See

          FR-902

        • ReadonlyghostUnitThreshold: 30

          Clarity below which Ghost Unit probability rises.

        • ReadonlyheadlineReliabilityReduction: 0.25

          Headline reliability reduction factor at low clarity.

          See

          FR-902

        • ReadonlyheadlineReliabilityThreshold: 40

          Clarity below which headline reliability degrades.

        • Readonlymax: 100

          Maximum clarity value.

        • Readonlymin: 0

          Minimum clarity value.

      • Readonlyoperations: {
            counterintel: {
                baseSuccessProbability: 0.6;
                diCost: 4;
                difficultyModifier: 0.3;
                primarySubScore: "covert";
                rivalClarityDecrease: 10;
            };
            gather: {
                baseSuccessProbability: 0.5;
                clarityIncrease: 10;
                diCost: 3;
                difficultyModifier: 0.5;
                primarySubScore: "sigint";
            };
            recruitAsset: {
                baseSuccessProbability: 0.35;
                defaultLifespan: 0;
                diCost: 8;
                difficultyModifier: 0.8;
                humintBonusPerTurn: 5;
                primarySubScore: "humint";
            };
            sabotage: {
                baseSuccessProbability: 0.4;
                diCost: 6;
                difficultyModifier: 1;
                primarySubScore: "cyber";
                targetStatReduction: -10;
                validTargets: readonly ["stability", "militaryReadiness", "treasury"];
            };
        }

        Intelligence operation parameters.

        See

        FR-903

        • Readonlycounterintel: {
              baseSuccessProbability: 0.6;
              diCost: 4;
              difficultyModifier: 0.3;
              primarySubScore: "covert";
              rivalClarityDecrease: 10;
          }

          Counterintel: reduce rival clarity on self.

          • ReadonlybaseSuccessProbability: 0.6
          • ReadonlydiCost: 4
          • ReadonlydifficultyModifier: 0.3
          • ReadonlyprimarySubScore: "covert"
          • ReadonlyrivalClarityDecrease: 10

            Rival clarity decrease on success.

        • Readonlygather: {
              baseSuccessProbability: 0.5;
              clarityIncrease: 10;
              diCost: 3;
              difficultyModifier: 0.5;
              primarySubScore: "sigint";
          }

          Gather: increase clarity on target.

          • ReadonlybaseSuccessProbability: 0.5

            Base success probability (modified by sub-score).

          • ReadonlyclarityIncrease: 10

            Clarity increase on success.

          • ReadonlydiCost: 3

            DI cost to execute.

          • ReadonlydifficultyModifier: 0.5

            Difficulty modifier for blowback.

          • ReadonlyprimarySubScore: "sigint"

            Primary sub-score used.

        • ReadonlyrecruitAsset: {
              baseSuccessProbability: 0.35;
              defaultLifespan: 0;
              diCost: 8;
              difficultyModifier: 0.8;
              humintBonusPerTurn: 5;
              primarySubScore: "humint";
          }

          Recruit Asset: plant long-term source.

          See

          FR-903

          • ReadonlybaseSuccessProbability: 0.35
          • ReadonlydefaultLifespan: 0

            Asset lifespan in turns (0 = until detected).

          • ReadonlydiCost: 8
          • ReadonlydifficultyModifier: 0.8
          • ReadonlyhumintBonusPerTurn: 5

            HUMINT bonus per turn while asset active.

          • ReadonlyprimarySubScore: "humint"
        • Readonlysabotage: {
              baseSuccessProbability: 0.4;
              diCost: 6;
              difficultyModifier: 1;
              primarySubScore: "cyber";
              targetStatReduction: -10;
              validTargets: readonly ["stability", "militaryReadiness", "treasury"];
          }

          Sabotage: reduce target stat via CYBER or COVERT roll.

          See

          FR-903

          • ReadonlybaseSuccessProbability: 0.4
          • ReadonlydiCost: 6
          • ReadonlydifficultyModifier: 1
          • ReadonlyprimarySubScore: "cyber"
          • ReadonlytargetStatReduction: -10

            Target stat reduction on success.

          • ReadonlyvalidTargets: readonly ["stability", "militaryReadiness", "treasury"]

            Possible target stats: stability, militaryReadiness, treasury.

      • Readonlysharing: { bonusMax: 15; bonusMin: 10; maxStrengthDiff: 50 }

        Alliance intelligence sharing parameters.

        See

        FR-905

        • ReadonlybonusMax: 15

          Maximum bonus to weaker partner's lowest sub-score.

          See

          FR-905

        • ReadonlybonusMin: 10

          Minimum bonus to weaker partner's lowest sub-score.

          See

          FR-905

        • ReadonlymaxStrengthDiff: 50

          Scaling factor: bonus = bonusMin + (strengthDiff / maxDiff) * (bonusMax - bonusMin).

      • ReadonlysubScoreWeights: { covert: 0.2; cyber: 0.25; humint: 0.3; sigint: 0.25 }

        Intelligence sub-score composite weights.

        See

        FR-901

    • ReadonlyintelReliability: {
          baseReliability: 60;
          falsePactRevealTurns: 2;
          falsePactSpawnProbability: 0.2;
          ghostUnitDecayTurns: 3;
          ghostUnitReliabilityThreshold: 40;
          ghostUnitSpawnProbability: 0.3;
          maxReliability: 95;
          minReliability: 10;
          reliabilityBoostPerDI: 5;
      }
      • ReadonlybaseReliability: 60

        Base reliability for intelligence reports (0–100).

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyfalsePactRevealTurns: 2

        False pacts are flagged/revealed after this many turns.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyfalsePactSpawnProbability: 0.2

        Probability of false diplomatic pact spawn when reliability < threshold.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyghostUnitDecayTurns: 3

        Ghost units disappear after this many turns.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyghostUnitReliabilityThreshold: 40

        Reliability threshold below which Ghost Units / False Pacts may spawn.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyghostUnitSpawnProbability: 0.3

        Probability of ghost unit spawn per turn when reliability < threshold.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlymaxReliability: 95

        Maximum intelligence reliability achievable.

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyminReliability: 10

        Minimum reliability floor (even with no investment).

        See

        FR-202

      • ReadonlyreliabilityBoostPerDI: 5

        Reliability boost per DI point invested in a region.

        See

        FR-204

    • ReadonlyleaderCreation: {
          aiPerception: {
              degradationPerInconsistency: 5;
              highAccuracyCounterBonus: 0.15;
              initialAccuracy: 70;
              maximumAccuracy: 95;
              minimumAccuracy: 20;
              recoveryPerConsistency: 2;
          };
          archetypes: {
              Dove: {
                  description: "Diplomatic peacemaker who exhausts negotiation before considering force.";
                  label: "Dove";
                  psychology: {
                      decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                      narcissism: 20;
                      paranoia: 30;
                      patience: 85;
                      pragmatism: 75;
                      riskTolerance: 25;
                      stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                      vengefulIndex: 15;
                  };
              };
              Hawk: {
                  description: "Aggressive militarist who favors decisive force over diplomacy.";
                  label: "Hawk";
                  psychology: {
                      decisionStyle: "Intuitive";
                      narcissism: 55;
                      paranoia: 60;
                      patience: 25;
                      pragmatism: 40;
                      riskTolerance: 80;
                      stressResponse: "Escalate";
                      vengefulIndex: 75;
                  };
              };
              Populist: {
                  description: "Charismatic leader who prioritizes domestic popularity over international norms.";
                  label: "Populist";
                  psychology: {
                      decisionStyle: "Transactional";
                      narcissism: 80;
                      paranoia: 70;
                      patience: 30;
                      pragmatism: 60;
                      riskTolerance: 65;
                      stressResponse: "Deflect";
                      vengefulIndex: 65;
                  };
              };
              Technocrat: {
                  description: "Data-driven strategist who values efficiency, institutions, and long-term planning.";
                  label: "Technocrat";
                  psychology: {
                      decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                      narcissism: 15;
                      paranoia: 25;
                      patience: 80;
                      pragmatism: 85;
                      riskTolerance: 35;
                      stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                      vengefulIndex: 20;
                  };
              };
          };
          consistency: {
              popularityPenalty: -5;
              warningMessage: "Your actions diverge from your stated leadership doctrine.";
              warningThresholdTurns: 3;
          };
          maxCustomRedLines: 3;
          sliderRange: { max: 100; min: 0 };
          vulnerabilities: {
              HealthRisk: {
                  description: "Leader has a chronic health condition. May be incapacitated for 2 turns.";
                  durationTurns: 2;
                  effect: "incapacitation";
                  label: "Health Risk";
                  triggerChancePerTurn: 0.03;
              };
              IdeologicalRigidity: {
                  description: "Cannot deviate from ideology without severe domestic backlash.";
                  effect: "backlash";
                  inconsistencyLoyaltyPenalty: -5;
                  inconsistencyPopularityPenalty: -8;
                  label: "Ideological Rigidity";
              };
              ScandalExposure: {
                  description: "Damaging personal information exists. If exposed, Popularity drops sharply.";
                  effect: "popularityDrop";
                  label: "Scandal Exposure";
                  popularityDelta: -20;
                  triggerChancePerTurn: 0.04;
              };
              SuccessionGap: {
                  description: "No clear successor. If leader removed, faction suffers 5 turns of instability.";
                  durationTurns: 5;
                  effect: "instability";
                  label: "Succession Gap";
                  stabilityPenaltyPerTurn: -5;
              };
          };
          vulnerabilityEvents: { earliestTriggerTurn: 5; maxTriggersPerGame: 1 };
      }
      • ReadonlyaiPerception: {
            degradationPerInconsistency: 5;
            highAccuracyCounterBonus: 0.15;
            initialAccuracy: 70;
            maximumAccuracy: 95;
            minimumAccuracy: 20;
            recoveryPerConsistency: 2;
        }

        AI perception model of player-leader.

        See

        FR-1204

        • ReadonlydegradationPerInconsistency: 5

          Accuracy degradation per inconsistent action.

          See

          FR-1204

        • ReadonlyhighAccuracyCounterBonus: 0.15

          Counter-strategy bonus for AI when accuracy is high (>70).

          See

          FR-1204

        • ReadonlyinitialAccuracy: 70

          Starting perception accuracy for AI (0-100).

          See

          FR-1204

        • ReadonlymaximumAccuracy: 95

          Maximum accuracy ceiling.

          See

          FR-1204

        • ReadonlyminimumAccuracy: 20

          Minimum accuracy floor.

          See

          FR-1204

        • ReadonlyrecoveryPerConsistency: 2

          Accuracy recovery per consistent action.

          See

          FR-1204

      • Readonlyarchetypes: {
            Dove: {
                description: "Diplomatic peacemaker who exhausts negotiation before considering force.";
                label: "Dove";
                psychology: {
                    decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                    narcissism: 20;
                    paranoia: 30;
                    patience: 85;
                    pragmatism: 75;
                    riskTolerance: 25;
                    stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                    vengefulIndex: 15;
                };
            };
            Hawk: {
                description: "Aggressive militarist who favors decisive force over diplomacy.";
                label: "Hawk";
                psychology: {
                    decisionStyle: "Intuitive";
                    narcissism: 55;
                    paranoia: 60;
                    patience: 25;
                    pragmatism: 40;
                    riskTolerance: 80;
                    stressResponse: "Escalate";
                    vengefulIndex: 75;
                };
            };
            Populist: {
                description: "Charismatic leader who prioritizes domestic popularity over international norms.";
                label: "Populist";
                psychology: {
                    decisionStyle: "Transactional";
                    narcissism: 80;
                    paranoia: 70;
                    patience: 30;
                    pragmatism: 60;
                    riskTolerance: 65;
                    stressResponse: "Deflect";
                    vengefulIndex: 65;
                };
            };
            Technocrat: {
                description: "Data-driven strategist who values efficiency, institutions, and long-term planning.";
                label: "Technocrat";
                psychology: {
                    decisionStyle: "Analytical";
                    narcissism: 15;
                    paranoia: 25;
                    patience: 80;
                    pragmatism: 85;
                    riskTolerance: 35;
                    stressResponse: "Consolidate";
                    vengefulIndex: 20;
                };
            };
        }

        Four preset archetype templates that pre-fill psychology sliders. Players can pick one as a starting point and adjust from there.

        See

        FR-1202

      • Readonlyconsistency: {
            popularityPenalty: -5;
            warningMessage: "Your actions diverge from your stated leadership doctrine.";
            warningThresholdTurns: 3;
        }

        Profile consistency configuration. When a player's actions deviate from their psychological profile, domestic media generates "Leader Contradicts Own Doctrine" headlines.

        See

        FR-1203

        • ReadonlypopularityPenalty: -5

          Popularity penalty per inconsistency event.

        • ReadonlywarningMessage: "Your actions diverge from your stated leadership doctrine."

          Advisory panel note text when inconsistency detected.

        • ReadonlywarningThresholdTurns: 3

          Turns of misalignment before inconsistency warning fires.

      • ReadonlymaxCustomRedLines: 3

        Maximum number of custom red lines a player can define.

      • ReadonlysliderRange: { max: 100; min: 0 }

        Minimum and maximum values for psychology sliders.

      • Readonlyvulnerabilities: {
            HealthRisk: {
                description: "Leader has a chronic health condition. May be incapacitated for 2 turns.";
                durationTurns: 2;
                effect: "incapacitation";
                label: "Health Risk";
                triggerChancePerTurn: 0.03;
            };
            IdeologicalRigidity: {
                description: "Cannot deviate from ideology without severe domestic backlash.";
                effect: "backlash";
                inconsistencyLoyaltyPenalty: -5;
                inconsistencyPopularityPenalty: -8;
                label: "Ideological Rigidity";
            };
            ScandalExposure: {
                description: "Damaging personal information exists. If exposed, Popularity drops sharply.";
                effect: "popularityDrop";
                label: "Scandal Exposure";
                popularityDelta: -20;
                triggerChancePerTurn: 0.04;
            };
            SuccessionGap: {
                description: "No clear successor. If leader removed, faction suffers 5 turns of instability.";
                durationTurns: 5;
                effect: "instability";
                label: "Succession Gap";
                stabilityPenaltyPerTurn: -5;
            };
        }

        Personal vulnerability options available during leader creation. Player must choose exactly 1.

        See

        FR-1205

        • ReadonlyHealthRisk: {
              description: "Leader has a chronic health condition. May be incapacitated for 2 turns.";
              durationTurns: 2;
              effect: "incapacitation";
              label: "Health Risk";
              triggerChancePerTurn: 0.03;
          }

          • ReadonlydurationTurns: 2

            Duration in turns if triggered.

          • Readonlyeffect: "incapacitation"

          • ReadonlytriggerChancePerTurn: 0.03

            Probability of triggering per turn (once per game).

        • ReadonlyIdeologicalRigidity: {
              description: "Cannot deviate from ideology without severe domestic backlash.";
              effect: "backlash";
              inconsistencyLoyaltyPenalty: -5;
              inconsistencyPopularityPenalty: -8;
              label: "Ideological Rigidity";
          }
          • Readonlydescription: "Cannot deviate from ideology without severe domestic backlash."
          • Readonlyeffect: "backlash"
          • ReadonlyinconsistencyLoyaltyPenalty: -5

            Power base loyalty penalty per inconsistent action.

          • ReadonlyinconsistencyPopularityPenalty: -8

            Popularity penalty per inconsistent action.

          • Readonlylabel: "Ideological Rigidity"
        • ReadonlyScandalExposure: {
              description: "Damaging personal information exists. If exposed, Popularity drops sharply.";
              effect: "popularityDrop";
              label: "Scandal Exposure";
              popularityDelta: -20;
              triggerChancePerTurn: 0.04;
          }
          • Readonlydescription: "Damaging personal information exists. If exposed, Popularity drops sharply."
          • Readonlyeffect: "popularityDrop"
          • Readonlylabel: "Scandal Exposure"
          • ReadonlypopularityDelta: -20

          • ReadonlytriggerChancePerTurn: 0.04

            Probability of triggering per turn (once per game).

        • ReadonlySuccessionGap: {
              description: "No clear successor. If leader removed, faction suffers 5 turns of instability.";
              durationTurns: 5;
              effect: "instability";
              label: "Succession Gap";
              stabilityPenaltyPerTurn: -5;
          }
          • Readonlydescription: "No clear successor. If leader removed, faction suffers 5 turns of instability."
          • ReadonlydurationTurns: 5

            Duration of instability debuff in turns.

          • Readonlyeffect: "instability"
          • Readonlylabel: "Succession Gap"
          • ReadonlystabilityPenaltyPerTurn: -5

            Stability penalty per turn during instability.

      • ReadonlyvulnerabilityEvents: { earliestTriggerTurn: 5; maxTriggersPerGame: 1 }

        Vulnerability event trigger parameters.

        See

        FR-1205

        • ReadonlyearliestTriggerTurn: 5

          Minimum turn before vulnerability can fire.

          See

          FR-1205

        • ReadonlymaxTriggersPerGame: 1

          Maximum times a vulnerability can fire (once per game).

          See

          FR-1205

    • ReadonlymarketReactions: {
          maxInflationDeltaPerTurn: 15;
          triggerCooldownTurns: 2;
          triggers: {
              hormuz: { inflationDelta: 5; keyword: "Strait of Hormuz" };
              nuclear: { inflationDelta: 8; keyword: "Nuclear Threshold" };
              rareEarth: { inflationDelta: 4; keyword: "Rare Earth Ban" };
          };
      }
      • ReadonlymaxInflationDeltaPerTurn: 15

        Maximum cumulative inflation delta from market reactions per turn.

        See

        FR-203

      • ReadonlytriggerCooldownTurns: 2

        Cooldown turns before the same trigger keyword can fire again.

        See

        FR-203

      • Readonlytriggers: {
            hormuz: { inflationDelta: 5; keyword: "Strait of Hormuz" };
            nuclear: { inflationDelta: 8; keyword: "Nuclear Threshold" };
            rareEarth: { inflationDelta: 4; keyword: "Rare Earth Ban" };
        }

        Trigger keywords scanned in headlines. Each keyword maps to an inflation delta applied when detected.

        See

        FR-203

        • Readonlyhormuz: { inflationDelta: 5; keyword: "Strait of Hormuz" }

          Strait of Hormuz disruption trigger.

          See

          FR-203

        • Readonlynuclear: { inflationDelta: 8; keyword: "Nuclear Threshold" }

          Nuclear threshold trigger.

          See

          FR-203

        • ReadonlyrareEarth: { inflationDelta: 4; keyword: "Rare Earth Ban" }

          Rare earth ban trigger.

          See

          FR-203

    • Readonlymeta: { FACTIONS_COUNT: 8; MAX_TURNS: 60; STARTING_MONTH: 3; STARTING_YEAR: 2026 }
      • ReadonlyFACTIONS_COUNT: 8

        Total number of playable factions.

        See

        NFR-204

      • ReadonlyMAX_TURNS: 60

        Maximum number of turns in a standard game.

        See

        NFR-204

      • ReadonlySTARTING_MONTH: 3

        Starting calendar month (1-based).

        See

        NFR-204

      • ReadonlySTARTING_YEAR: 2026

        Starting calendar year.

        See

        NFR-204

    • Readonlymilitary: {
          doctrines: {
              a2ad: {
                  defenseBonus: 0.3;
                  description: "Anti-Access/Area Denial: +30% defense within first island chain.";
                  factionId: "China";
                  label: "A2/AD";
                  qualifier: "islandChain";
              };
              asymmetricSwarm: {
                  antiNavalBonus: 0.2;
                  description: "Asymmetric Swarm: +20% vs naval units in littoral hexes.";
                  factionId: "Iran";
                  label: "Asymmetric Swarm";
                  qualifier: "littoralHex";
              };
              collectiveDefense: {
                  alliedDefenseBonus: 0.2;
                  description: "Collective Defense: +20% when defending allied territory, 50% slower readiness decay.";
                  factionId: "EU";
                  label: "Collective Defense";
                  readinessDecayReduction: 0.5;
              };
              escalationDominance: {
                  defenseBonus: 0.15;
                  description: "Escalation Dominance: +5 nuclear threshold pressure, +15% home defense.";
                  factionId: "Russia";
                  label: "Escalation Dominance";
                  nuclearThresholdPressure: 5;
                  qualifier: "homeTerritory";
              };
              fortressKorea: {
                  defenseBonus: 0.4;
                  description: "Fortress Korea: +40% defense on home territory.";
                  factionId: "DPRK";
                  label: "Fortress Korea";
                  qualifier: "homeTerritory";
              };
              globalReach: {
                  coalitionAttackBonus: 0.1;
                  description: "Global Reach: +3 hex range, +10% attack with allied units.";
                  factionId: "US";
                  label: "Global Reach";
                  projectionBonus: 3;
              };
              maritimeShield: {
                  description: "Maritime Shield: +25% naval defense in coastal hexes.";
                  factionId: "Japan";
                  label: "Maritime Shield";
                  navalDefenseBonus: 0.25;
                  qualifier: "coastalHex";
              };
              strategicPatience: {
                  attritionReduction: 0.2;
                  description: "Strategic Patience: 20% less attrition, +10% combat bonus after 3 turns.";
                  factionId: "India";
                  label: "Strategic Patience";
                  prolongedCombatBonus: 0.1;
                  prolongedCombatTurnThreshold: 3;
              };
          };
          forceProjection: {
              borderOnlyThreshold: 30;
              carrierDeploymentBonus: 3;
              hexRangeDivisor: 10;
              maxRange: 15;
              minRange: 1;
              overseasBaseBonus: 2;
          };
          foreignPropaganda: { covertMultiplierPerTurn: 0.1 };
          japanLatentNuclear: {
              amendmentStabilityThreshold: 40;
              chinaNuclearThresholdIncrease: 15;
              diPenalty: -30;
              dprkNuclearThresholdIncrease: 20;
              rdTurns: 6;
              stabilityPenalty: -25;
          };
          lowReadinessPenalty: { penalty: -0.25; threshold: 30 };
          modernization: {
              investmentPerTurn: 15;
              milestones: readonly [
                  {
                      description: "Advanced precision munitions";
                      threshold: 40;
                      unlock: "advancedMissiles";
                  },
                  {
                      description: "Stealth fighter/bomber operations";
                      threshold: 55;
                      unlock: "stealthAircraft";
                  },
                  {
                      description: "Offensive cyber operations";
                      threshold: 70;
                      unlock: "cyberWarfare";
                  },
                  {
                      description: "Hypersonic strike capability";
                      threshold: 85;
                      unlock: "hypersonicWeapons";
                  },
                  {
                      description: "AI-directed autonomous weapons";
                      threshold: 95;
                      unlock: "aiAutonomous";
                  },
              ];
              techLevelGainPerInvestment: 2;
          };
          readinessDecay: { activeCombatPerTurn: -2; lowTreasuryPerTurn: -1 };
          specialCapabilities: {
              artilleryBarragSeoul: {
                  civilianCasualties: true;
                  description: "Instant stability damage to South Korea without declaration of war.";
                  factionId: "DPRK";
                  label: "Artillery Barrage Seoul";
                  readinessCost: 5;
                  requiresDeclarationOfWar: false;
                  stabilityDamage: -20;
                  targetFaction: "SouthKorea";
                  tensionIncrease: 25;
                  treasuryCost: 8;
              };
              carrierKillerSalvo: {
                  bypassesSurfaceEscorts: true;
                  cooldownTurns: 3;
                  description: "DF-21D targeting: bypasses surface escorts, 2× naval damage.";
                  factionId: "China";
                  label: "Carrier Killer Salvo";
                  navalDamageMultiplier: 2;
                  range: 8;
                  readinessCost: 4;
                  treasuryCost: 12;
              };
              droneSwarm: {
                  areaDenialRadius: 2;
                  attritionPerTurn: 0.08;
                  description: "Area denial via low-cost drone swarm; targets suffer 8% attrition per turn.";
                  duration: 3;
                  factionId: "Iran";
                  label: "Drone Swarm";
                  readinessCost: 3;
                  treasuryCost: 5;
              };
          };
      }

      • ReadonlyforceProjection: {
            borderOnlyThreshold: 30;
            carrierDeploymentBonus: 3;
            hexRangeDivisor: 10;
            maxRange: 15;
            minRange: 1;
            overseasBaseBonus: 2;
        }

        Force projection configuration.

        See

        FR-1002

        • ReadonlyborderOnlyThreshold: 30

          Nations with ForceProjection below this are limited to border-adjacent hexes.

          See

          FR-1002

        • ReadonlycarrierDeploymentBonus: 3

          Additional hex range per deployed carrier group.

          See

          FR-1002

        • ReadonlyhexRangeDivisor: 10

          Default hex range = floor(ForceProjection / this divisor).

          See

          FR-1002

        • ReadonlymaxRange: 15

          Maximum projection range cap.

          See

          FR-1002

        • ReadonlyminRange: 1

          Minimum projection range (always at least border-adjacent).

          See

          FR-1002

        • ReadonlyoverseasBaseBonus: 2

          Additional hex range per overseas base.

          See

          FR-1002

      • ReadonlyforeignPropaganda: { covertMultiplierPerTurn: 0.1 }

        Foreign propaganda effectiveness.

        See

        FR-1007

        • ReadonlycovertMultiplierPerTurn: 0.1

          Propaganda effect: COVERT * this multiplier per turn.

          See

          FR-1007

      • ReadonlyjapanLatentNuclear: {
            amendmentStabilityThreshold: 40;
            chinaNuclearThresholdIncrease: 15;
            diPenalty: -30;
            dprkNuclearThresholdIncrease: 20;
            rdTurns: 6;
            stabilityPenalty: -25;
        }

        Japan latent nuclear capability.

        See

        FR-1007

        • ReadonlyamendmentStabilityThreshold: 40

          Minimum stability to pass constitutional amendment.

          See

          FR-1007

        • ReadonlychinaNuclearThresholdIncrease: 15

          Nuclear threshold increase in China from Japan's nuclearization.

          See

          FR-1007

        • ReadonlydiPenalty: -30

          Diplomatic Influence penalty from nuclear development.

          See

          FR-1007

        • ReadonlydprkNuclearThresholdIncrease: 20

          Nuclear threshold increase in DPRK from Japan's nuclearization.

          See

          FR-1007

        • ReadonlyrdTurns: 6

          R&D turns required to acquire nuclear weapons.

          See

          FR-1007

        • ReadonlystabilityPenalty: -25

          Stability penalty from nuclear development.

          See

          FR-1007

      • ReadonlylowReadinessPenalty: { penalty: -0.25; threshold: 30 }

        Low readiness penalty.

        See

        FR-1004

        • Readonlypenalty: -0.25

          Combat effectiveness penalty below threshold.

          See

          FR-1004

        • Readonlythreshold: 30

          Readiness threshold for combat penalty.

          See

          FR-1004

      • ReadonlyreadinessDecay: { activeCombatPerTurn: -2; lowTreasuryPerTurn: -1 }

        Readiness decay rates.

        See

        FR-1004

        • ReadonlyactiveCombatPerTurn: -2

          Readiness loss per turn during active combat.

          See

          FR-1004

        • ReadonlylowTreasuryPerTurn: -1

          Readiness loss per turn when treasury is low.

          See

          FR-1004

    • Readonlymodding: {
          exportSchemaVersion: "1.0.0";
          maxCustomLeaders: 50;
          maxCustomScenarios: 20;
          maxEventHandlers: 100;
      }
      • ReadonlyexportSchemaVersion: "1.0.0"

        Schema version for export/import compatibility.

      • ReadonlymaxCustomLeaders: 50

        Maximum custom leaders that can be exported.

      • ReadonlymaxCustomScenarios: 20

        Maximum custom scenarios.

      • ReadonlymaxEventHandlers: 100

        Maximum pluggable event handlers.

        See

        NFR-203

    • Readonlynuclear: {
          bandModifiers: {
              deterrence: { maxSignalTestIncrease: 5; passiveDecayPerTurn: -1 };
              tacticalReadiness: {
                  existentialThreatIncrease: 10;
                  mobileLauncherIncrease: 5;
                  passiveDriftPerTurn: 1;
              };
              thresholdBreach: { diplomacyReductionMax: 15; passiveDriftPerTurn: 2 };
          };
          demonstrationStrike: {
              capitalThreatThresholdBoost: 20;
              diPenalty: -30;
              globalTensionIncrease: 25;
              stabilityThreshold: 15;
              targetStabilityPenalty: -15;
              thresholdIncrease: 15;
          };
          demonstrationStrikeStabilityThreshold: 15;
          escalationBands: {
              deterrenceMax: 30;
              tacticalReadinessMax: 70;
              tacticalReadinessMin: 31;
              thresholdBreachMax: 100;
              thresholdBreachMin: 71;
          };
          iran: {
              decentralizedCommand: true;
              dirtyBombGlobalTensionIncrease: 30;
              dirtyBombIranDiPenalty: -40;
              dirtyBombIsraelStabilityPenalty: -25;
              dirtyBombThresholdIncrease: 30;
              dirtyBombTriggersUSRetaliation: true;
              usRetaliationIranMilitaryPenalty: -40;
              usRetaliationIranStabilityPenalty: -30;
          };
          redTelephone: {
              cooldownTurns: 3;
              diCost: 10;
              highTrustDiscount: 0.5;
              minimumTrust: 20;
              thresholdReduction: 15;
          };
          redTelephoneDICost: 10;
          secondStrike: {
              capableFactions: readonly string[];
              counterStrikeProbability: 0.9;
              exchangeStabilityCollapse: -50;
              exchangeThresholdMax: 100;
          };
      }
      • ReadonlybandModifiers: {
            deterrence: { maxSignalTestIncrease: 5; passiveDecayPerTurn: -1 };
            tacticalReadiness: {
                existentialThreatIncrease: 10;
                mobileLauncherIncrease: 5;
                passiveDriftPerTurn: 1;
            };
            thresholdBreach: { diplomacyReductionMax: 15; passiveDriftPerTurn: 2 };
        }

        Per-turn threshold modifiers for each band.

        See

        FR-501

        • Readonlydeterrence: { maxSignalTestIncrease: 5; passiveDecayPerTurn: -1 }

          Deterrence (0–30): passive drift per turn towards stability.

          • ReadonlymaxSignalTestIncrease: 5

            Maximum threshold increase from signal tests.

            See

            FR-502

          • ReadonlypassiveDecayPerTurn: -1

            Passive threshold decay per turn (negative = cooling).

            See

            FR-502

        • ReadonlytacticalReadiness: {
              existentialThreatIncrease: 10;
              mobileLauncherIncrease: 5;
              passiveDriftPerTurn: 1;
          }

          Tactical Readiness (31–70): escalation-prone zone.

          See

          FR-503

          • ReadonlyexistentialThreatIncrease: 10

            Threshold increase when existential threat detected.

            See

            FR-503

          • ReadonlymobileLauncherIncrease: 5

            Threshold increase for mobile launcher repositioning.

            See

            FR-503

          • ReadonlypassiveDriftPerTurn: 1

            Passive drift per turn (slight increase from arms race).

        • ReadonlythresholdBreach: { diplomacyReductionMax: 15; passiveDriftPerTurn: 2 }

          Threshold Breach (71–100): active danger zone.

          See

          FR-504

          • ReadonlydiplomacyReductionMax: 15

            Threshold reduction from successful diplomacy.

          • ReadonlypassiveDriftPerTurn: 2

            Passive drift per turn (strong increase from crisis momentum).

      • ReadonlydemonstrationStrike: {
            capitalThreatThresholdBoost: 20;
            diPenalty: -30;
            globalTensionIncrease: 25;
            stabilityThreshold: 15;
            targetStabilityPenalty: -15;
            thresholdIncrease: 15;
        }

        Demonstration strike parameters.

        See

        FR-504

        • ReadonlycapitalThreatThresholdBoost: 20

          Capital threatened — threshold boost.

          See

          FR-504

        • ReadonlydiPenalty: -30

          Diplomatic Influence penalty for the striking nation.

          See

          FR-504

        • ReadonlyglobalTensionIncrease: 25

          Global tension increase to all rivals.

          See

          FR-504

        • ReadonlystabilityThreshold: 15

          Stability below this triggers AI consideration of demonstration strike.

          See

          FR-504

        • ReadonlytargetStabilityPenalty: -15

          Target stability penalty.

          See

          FR-504

        • ReadonlythresholdIncrease: 15

          Threshold increase for the striking nation.

          See

          FR-504

      • ReadonlydemonstrationStrikeStabilityThreshold: 15

        Demonstration strike trigger: stability below this value.

        See

        FR-505

      • ReadonlyescalationBands: {
            deterrenceMax: 30;
            tacticalReadinessMax: 70;
            tacticalReadinessMin: 31;
            thresholdBreachMax: 100;
            thresholdBreachMin: 71;
        }

        Escalation band boundaries.

        See

        FR-501

        • ReadonlydeterrenceMax: 30

          Deterrence band upper bound: 0-30.

          See

          FR-501

        • ReadonlytacticalReadinessMax: 70

          Tactical Readiness band upper bound.

          See

          FR-501

        • ReadonlytacticalReadinessMin: 31

          Tactical Readiness band lower bound: 31-70.

          See

          FR-501

        • ReadonlythresholdBreachMax: 100

          Threshold Breach band upper bound.

          See

          FR-501

        • ReadonlythresholdBreachMin: 71

          Threshold Breach band lower bound: 71-100.

          See

          FR-501

      • Readonlyiran: {
            decentralizedCommand: true;
            dirtyBombGlobalTensionIncrease: 30;
            dirtyBombIranDiPenalty: -40;
            dirtyBombIsraelStabilityPenalty: -25;
            dirtyBombThresholdIncrease: 30;
            dirtyBombTriggersUSRetaliation: true;
            usRetaliationIranMilitaryPenalty: -40;
            usRetaliationIranStabilityPenalty: -30;
        }

        Iran-specific nuclear mechanics.

        See

        FR-506

        • ReadonlydecentralizedCommand: true

          Iran uses decentralized command post-March 1.

          See

          FR-506

        • ReadonlydirtyBombGlobalTensionIncrease: 30

          Global tension increase from dirty bomb.

        • ReadonlydirtyBombIranDiPenalty: -40

          Dirty bomb global DI penalty to Iran.

          See

          FR-506

        • ReadonlydirtyBombIsraelStabilityPenalty: -25

          Dirty bomb stability penalty to Israel.

          See

          FR-506

        • ReadonlydirtyBombThresholdIncrease: 30

          Threshold increase for Iran after dirty bomb.

        • ReadonlydirtyBombTriggersUSRetaliation: true

          Dirty bomb triggers immediate US strategic retaliation.

          See

          FR-506

        • ReadonlyusRetaliationIranMilitaryPenalty: -40

          US retaliation military readiness penalty to Iran.

          See

          FR-506

        • ReadonlyusRetaliationIranStabilityPenalty: -30

          US retaliation stability penalty to Iran.

          See

          FR-506

      • ReadonlyredTelephone: {
            cooldownTurns: 3;
            diCost: 10;
            highTrustDiscount: 0.5;
            minimumTrust: 20;
            thresholdReduction: 15;
        }

        Red Telephone de-escalation.

        See

        FR-507

        • ReadonlycooldownTurns: 3

          Cooldown turns before reuse between same pair.

        • ReadonlydiCost: 10

          Diplomatic Influence cost to initiate.

          See

          FR-507

        • ReadonlyhighTrustDiscount: 0.5

          Cost discount at high trust (>60).

          See

          FR-1509

        • ReadonlyminimumTrust: 20

          Minimum trust required between leaders (from ChemistryTrustEngine).

        • ReadonlythresholdReduction: 15

          Threshold reduction for both nations.

          See

          FR-507

      • ReadonlyredTelephoneDICost: 10

        Diplomatic Influence cost for Red Telephone de-escalation.

        See

        FR-507

      • ReadonlysecondStrike: {
            capableFactions: readonly string[];
            counterStrikeProbability: 0.9;
            exchangeStabilityCollapse: -50;
            exchangeThresholdMax: 100;
        }

        Second-strike automated response.

        See

        FR-505

        • ReadonlycapableFactions: readonly string[]

          Factions with second-strike capability.

          See

          FR-505

        • ReadonlycounterStrikeProbability: 0.9

          Probability of counter-strike (0.0–1.0).

          See

          FR-505

        • ReadonlyexchangeStabilityCollapse: -50

          Stability collapse for both attacker and target after exchange.

          See

          FR-505

        • ReadonlyexchangeThresholdMax: 100

          Nuclear threshold set to max for both parties after exchange.

    • ReadonlypostGameAnalysis: {
          grudgeTimelineMaxEntries: 20;
          inflectionPointThreshold: 15;
          minInflectionPointsPerGame: 3;
          psychologicalShiftMinDelta: 20;
          psychologicalTurningPointThreshold: 80;
          radarDimensions: readonly [
              "riskTolerance",
              "paranoia",
              "narcissism",
              "pragmatism",
              "patience",
              "vengefulIndex",
          ];
          reportGenerationTimeoutMs: 2000;
          roadNotTakenHorizon: 5;
          roadNotTakenMaxProjections: 10;
      }
      • ReadonlygrudgeTimelineMaxEntries: 20

        Grudge timeline: max grudges to show in summary.

        See

        FR-1522

      • ReadonlyinflectionPointThreshold: 15

        Inflection point threshold: viability shift >= this triggers identification.

        See

        FR-1410

      • ReadonlyminInflectionPointsPerGame: 3

        Minimum inflection points expected per game.

        See

        FR-1410

      • ReadonlypsychologicalShiftMinDelta: 20

        Minimum emotional shift (delta) to qualify as a turning point.

        See

        FR-1522

      • ReadonlypsychologicalTurningPointThreshold: 80

        Psychological turning point: emotion threshold that triggers identification.

        See

        FR-1522

      • ReadonlyradarDimensions: readonly [
            "riskTolerance",
            "paranoia",
            "narcissism",
            "pragmatism",
            "patience",
            "vengefulIndex",
        ]

        Radar chart dimensions for personality drift.

        See

        FR-1522

      • ReadonlyreportGenerationTimeoutMs: 2000

        Time limit for report generation (ms).

        See

        FR-1410

      • ReadonlyroadNotTakenHorizon: 5

        Road Not Taken: projection horizon (turns ahead).

        See

        FR-1410

      • ReadonlyroadNotTakenMaxProjections: 10

        Road Not Taken: max alternative projections to compute.

        See

        FR-1410

    • ReadonlypowerBase: {
          coup: { militaryThreshold: 30; securityThreshold: 30 };
          coupFormula: {
              base: 100;
              militaryWeight: 0.3;
              popularityWeight: 0.2;
              securityWeight: 0.3;
          };
          erosionPerAction: {
              economicSanctions: {
                  clergy: 0;
                  military: 0;
                  oligarchs: -8;
                  party: -3;
                  public: -5;
                  securityServices: 0;
              };
              intelligenceExpansion: {
                  clergy: -1;
                  military: 0;
                  oligarchs: 0;
                  party: -2;
                  public: -4;
                  securityServices: 8;
              };
              militarySpending: {
                  clergy: 0;
                  military: 6;
                  oligarchs: -2;
                  party: 0;
                  public: -3;
                  securityServices: 2;
              };
              religiousCrackdown: {
                  clergy: -12;
                  military: 0;
                  oligarchs: 0;
                  party: 2;
                  public: -5;
                  securityServices: 3;
              };
              socialReform: {
                  clergy: 0;
                  military: -2;
                  oligarchs: -3;
                  party: 0;
                  public: 8;
                  securityServices: 0;
              };
              unpopularWar: {
                  clergy: 0;
                  military: 5;
                  oligarchs: -3;
                  party: -2;
                  public: -10;
                  securityServices: 3;
              };
          };
          hostileThreshold: 15;
      }
      • Readonlycoup: { militaryThreshold: 30; securityThreshold: 30 }

        Coup trigger conditions.

        See

        FR-1311

        • ReadonlymilitaryThreshold: 30

          Military power-base threshold (below this enables coup).

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlysecurityThreshold: 30

          Security services power-base threshold (below this enables coup).

          See

          FR-1311

      • ReadonlycoupFormula: { base: 100; militaryWeight: 0.3; popularityWeight: 0.2; securityWeight: 0.3 }

        Coup formula weights: CoupChance = (100 - military) * 0.3 + (100 - securityServices) * 0.3 - Popularity * 0.2.

        See

        FR-1311

        • Readonlybase: 100

          Base value from which military is subtracted.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlymilitaryWeight: 0.3

          Weight of military deficit.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlypopularityWeight: 0.2

          Weight of popularity (negative = protective).

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlysecurityWeight: 0.3

          Weight of security services deficit.

          See

          FR-1311

      • ReadonlyerosionPerAction: {
            economicSanctions: {
                clergy: 0;
                military: 0;
                oligarchs: -8;
                party: -3;
                public: -5;
                securityServices: 0;
            };
            intelligenceExpansion: {
                clergy: -1;
                military: 0;
                oligarchs: 0;
                party: -2;

                securityServices: 8;

    • Readonlyproxy: {
          arming: {
              capabilityBoost: 10;
              deniabilityReduction: -10;
              treasuryCost: -5;
          };
          armsBazaar: {
              defectiveChance: 0.2;
              deliveryDelay: 2;
              sanctionedPriceMultiplier: 2;
              surplusValue: 0.5;
              weaponLeakChance: 0.1;
          };
          autonomousOperation: { autonomyThreshold: 60; operationChancePerTurn: 0.3 };
          deniabilityDegradation: {
              arming: -10;
              directing: -5;
              humint: -20;
              mediaExposure: -15;
          };
          discovery: { base: 100; legitimacyPenalty: -10; tensionIncrease: 15 };
          escalationLadder: { acknowledgedSupportCapabilityBonus: 15 };
          escalationLadderTensionPerLevel: 15;
          failedState: {
              intelCostReduction: 0.5;
              proxySpawnRateTurns: 3;
              stabilityThreshold: 10;
          };
          failedStateExploitation: {
              exploitationLegitimacyPenalty: -10;
              peacekeepingLegitimacyBonus: 10;
              stabilizationTurns: 6;
          };
          independence: { autonomyThreshold: 80; capabilityThreshold: 80 };
          loyaltyDefection: { loyaltyThreshold: 30 };
          politicalCampaign: {
              civilUnrestIncrease: 5;
              deniabilityReduction: -5;
              diCost: -3;
          };
          terrorist: {
              discoveryLegitimacyPenalty: -20;
              sponsorDiscoveryTensionIncrease: 20;
              warOnTerrorLegitimacyBonus: 15;
          };
      }

        See

        FR-2002

          See

          FR-2002

        • ReadonlydeniabilityReduction: -10

          See

          FR-2002

        • ReadonlytreasuryCost: -5

          See

          FR-2002

      • ReadonlyarmsBazaar: {
            defectiveChance: 0.2;
            deliveryDelay: 2;
            sanctionedPriceMultiplier: 2;

        }

        FR-2008

        • ReadonlydefectiveChance: 0.2

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlydeliveryDelay: 2

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlysanctionedPriceMultiplier: 2

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlysurplusValue: 0.5

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlyweaponLeakChance: 0.1

          See

          FR-2008

        FR-2004

          FR-2004

        • Readonlydirecting: -5

          FR-2004

        • Readonlyhumint: -20

          See

          FR-2004

        • ReadonlymediaExposure: -15

          Deniability loss from media exposure.

          See

          FR-2004

        Discovery probability: 100 - deniability.

        See

        FR-2001

          Base value from which deniability is subtracted.

          See

          FR-2001

        • ReadonlylegitimacyPenalty: -10

          Legitimacy penalty upon discovery.

          See

          FR-2001

        • ReadonlytensionIncrease: 15

          See

          FR-2001

        See

        FR-2008

          FR-2008

      • ReadonlyescalationLadderTensionPerLevel: 15

        See

        FR-2007

        FR-2008

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlyproxySpawnRateTurns: 3

          See

          FR-2008

        • ReadonlystabilityThreshold: 10

          Stability threshold below which a state is "failed".

          See

          FR-2008

    • Readonlypsychology: {
          chemistry: {
              agreementAcceptanceBonus: 0.1;
              agreementAcceptancePenalty: -0.1;
              tensionIncreasePerNegative: 5;
              tensionReductionPerPositive: -5;
          };
          cognitiveBiases: {
              anchoring: { firstEventWeightBonus: 0.25 };
              availabilityHeuristic: { recencyWindow: 3; recentEventThreatBonus: 0.4 };
              confirmationBias: { alignedIntelWeightBonus: 0.25 };
              dunningKruger: { competenceThreshold: 30; overconfidenceBonus: 0.15 };
              escalationOfCommitment: {
                  deescalationPenalty: -0.25;
                  nuclearThresholdTrigger: 50;
              };
              groupthink: { factionAlignedBonus: 0.2; opposedPenalty: -0.4 };
              lossAversion: { defensiveWeightMultiplier: 2; offensivePenalty: -0.3 };
              optimism: { riskUnderestimate: 0.2 };
              recency: { recencyWindow: 2; recentWeightBonus: 0.2 };
              sunkCost: { continuingWeightBonus: 0.3; triggerTurns: 3 };
          };
          counterIntel: {
              emotionalDisciplineReduction: 0.3;
              emotionalDisciplineResolveThreshold: 70;
              intelligenceInoculationNationalismBoost: 5;
              mediaCounterNarrativeDiCost: -5;
          };
          decisionFatigue: {
              defaultingChance: 0.3;
              deferralChance: 0.2;
              impulsivityChance: 0.1;
              peacetimeResetPerTurn: -20;
              threshold: 60;
          };
          diplomaticEncounter: {
              chemistryWeight: 0.3;
              coercionBonus: 0.1;
              emotionalAlignmentWeight: 0.2;
              relativePowerWeight: 0.2;
              trustWeight: 0.3;
          };
          echoChamber: {
              biasIntensification: 20;
              exitThreshold: 70;
              factionUtilityBonus: 0.25;
              intelligenceReliabilityPenalty: -0.3;
              opposedUtilityPenalty: -0.4;
              powerBaseThreshold: 80;
          };
          emotionalContagion: {
              autocracyContagionRate: 0.5;
              democracyContagionRate: 1;
              divergenceTurns: 3;
              leaderToPopulationRate: 0.1;
              populationDivergenceThreshold: 40;
              stressPenaltyPerTurn: 5;
          };
          emotionalModifiers: {
              highAnger: { aggressiveActionWeightBonus: 0.2; threshold: 60 };
              highConfidence: { riskToleranceBoost: 15; threshold: 70 };
              highFear: { defensiveActionWeightBonus: 0.15; threshold: 60 };
              highResolve: { stressGainReduction: 0.5; threshold: 70 };
              highStress: { decisionNoiseRange: 0.15; threshold: 70 };
          };
          grudge: {
              decayPerTurn: -0.5;
              minimumSeverity: 1;
              retaliationUtilityMultiplier: 2;
              vengefulDecayReduction: 0.5;
          };
          massPsychologyEffects: {
              angerLowHopeUnrestPerTurn: 10;
              desertionRate: 0.1;
              highAngerThreshold: 60;
              highNationalismThreshold: 60;
              lowHopeThreshold: 30;
              lowHopeTreasuryPenalty: -0.1;
              nationalismUnrestDampening: -5;
              recruitmentBonus: 0.15;
              recruitmentPenalty: -0.2;
              warBondBonus: 0.1;
              wearinessEffectThreshold: 60;
          };
          personalityDrift: {
              betrayalParanoiaIncrease: 15;
              nearLossPragmatismBoost: 10;
              nearLossResolveBoost: 10;
              nearLossStabilityThreshold: 10;
              riskToleranceShift: 10;
              stressDriftThreshold: 60;
              stressDriftTurns: 6;
              victoryConfidenceBoost: 10;
              victoryNarcissismBoost: 5;
          };
          psyOps: {
              diplomaticGhosting: {
                  durationTurns: 3;
                  targetAngerIncrease: 10;
                  targetParanoiaIncrease: 10;
                  tensionIncrease: 15;
              };
              provocativePosturing: {
                  conflictChancePerParanoia: 0.05;
                  targetFearIncrease: 10;
              };
              publicHumiliation: {
                  discoveredDiPenalty: -10;
                  discoveryChance: 0.3;
                  targetAngerIncrease: 20;
                  targetConfidenceDecrease: -15;
              };
              strategicAmbiguity: {
                  readinessCost: -5;
                  targetFearIncrease: 15;
                  targetStressIncrease: 10;
              };
          };
          stressInoculation: {
              ideologyReduction: -10;
              pragmatismBoost: 10;
              stressGainReduction: -0.2;
              stressThreshold: 50;
              turnsRequired: 20;
          };
          sycophancy: {
              newsDelay: 1;
              paranoiaThreshold: 70;
              reliabilityInflation: 15;
              securityThreshold: 80;
              unrestWarningDelay: 2;
          };
          traumaResponse: {
              assassinationAttempt: {
                  paranoiaBoost: 25;
                  publicPowerBasePenalty: -5;
                  securityPowerBaseBoost: 10;
              };
              capitalSiege: {
                  emotionalSpikeTo: 80;
                  fatigueMultiplier: 3;
                  fatigueMultiplierDuration: 6;
              };
              nuclearStrike: {
                  escalateChance: 0.8;
                  fearPermanentMin: 70;
                  retreatChance: 0.2;
              };
          };
          trust: {
              ideologicalAlignmentMultiplier: 0.5;
              pastBetrayalMultiplier: -10;
              promisesBrokenMultiplier: -5;
              promisesKeptMultiplier: 2;
          };
          trustThresholds: {
              defensePact: 40;
              intelligenceSharing: 60;
              NAP: 20;
              redTelephoneDiscount: 0.5;
          };
          warWeariness: {
              activeConflictPerTurn: 3;
              civilUnrestBonus: 5;
              effectsThreshold: 70;
              greyZonePerTurn: 1;
              nationalismResistanceReduction: -1;
              nationalismResistanceThreshold: 60;
              peacetimeDecayPerTurn: -2;
              popularityDecayPerTurn: -3;
              treasuryCostMultiplier: 1.25;
          };
      }
      • Readonlychemistry: {
            agreementAcceptanceBonus: 0.1;
            agreementAcceptancePenalty: -0.1;
            tensionIncreasePerNegative: 5;
            tensionReductionPerPositive: -5;

        See

        FR-1508

        • ReadonlyagreementAcceptanceBonus: 0.1

          FR-1508

        • ReadonlyagreementAcceptancePenalty: -0.1

          See

          FR-1508

        • ReadonlytensionIncreasePerNegative: 5

          Tension increase per negative chemistry point.

          See

          FR-1508

        • ReadonlytensionReductionPerPositive: -5

          Tension reduction per positive chemistry point.

          See

          FR-1508

      • ReadonlycognitiveBiases: {
            anchoring: { firstEventWeightBonus: 0.25 };
            availabilityHeuristic: { recencyWindow: 3; recentEventThreatBonus: 0.4 };
            confirmationBias: { alignedIntelWeightBonus: 0.25 };
            dunningKruger: { competenceThreshold: 30; overconfidenceBonus: 0.15 };
            escalationOfCommitment: {
                deescalationPenalty: -0.25;
                nuclearThresholdTrigger: 50;
            };
            groupthink: { factionAlignedBonus: 0.2; opposedPenalty: -0.4 };
            lossAversion: { defensiveWeightMultiplier: 2; offensivePenalty: -0.3 };
            optimism: { riskUnderestimate: 0.2 };
            recency: { recencyWindow: 2; recentWeightBonus: 0.2 };
            sunkCost: { continuingWeightBonus: 0.3; triggerTurns: 3 };
        }

        Cognitive bias intensity parameters.

        See

        FR-1505

        • Readonlyanchoring: { firstEventWeightBonus: 0.25 }

          Anchoring bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlyfirstEventWeightBonus: 0.25

            Weight bonus to first-encountered event assessment.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlyavailabilityHeuristic: { recencyWindow: 3; recentEventThreatBonus: 0.4 }

          Availability Heuristic.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlyrecencyWindow: 3

            Number of turns an event remains "recent".

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlyrecentEventThreatBonus: 0.4

            Threat bonus for recently experienced events.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlyconfirmationBias: { alignedIntelWeightBonus: 0.25 }

          Confirmation Bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlyalignedIntelWeightBonus: 0.25

            Weight bonus to intelligence aligned with existing beliefs.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlydunningKruger: { competenceThreshold: 30; overconfidenceBonus: 0.15 }

          Dunning-Kruger effect.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlycompetenceThreshold: 30

            Competence threshold below which effect activates.

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlyoverconfidenceBonus: 0.15

            Overconfidence bonus applied when competence is low.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlyescalationOfCommitment: { deescalationPenalty: -0.25; nuclearThresholdTrigger: 50 }

          Escalation of Commitment.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlydeescalationPenalty: -0.25

            Penalty to de-escalation option utility.

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlynuclearThresholdTrigger: 50

            Nuclear threshold that triggers escalation commitment.

            See

            FR-1505

        • Readonlygroupthink: { factionAlignedBonus: 0.2; opposedPenalty: -0.4 }

          Groupthink bias.

          See

          FR-1515

          • ReadonlyfactionAlignedBonus: 0.2

            Utility bonus for faction-aligned options.

            See

            FR-1515

          • ReadonlyopposedPenalty: -0.4

            Utility penalty for options opposed by faction.

            See

            FR-1515

        • ReadonlylossAversion: { defensiveWeightMultiplier: 2; offensivePenalty: -0.3 }

          Loss Aversion bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlydefensiveWeightMultiplier: 2

            Multiplier on defensive option utility.

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlyoffensivePenalty: -0.3

            Penalty to offensive option utility.

            See

            FR-1505

        • Readonlyoptimism: { riskUnderestimate: 0.2 }

          Optimism bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlyriskUnderestimate: 0.2

            Degree to which risk is underestimated.

            See

            FR-1505

        • Readonlyrecency: { recencyWindow: 2; recentWeightBonus: 0.2 }

          Recency bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlyrecencyWindow: 2

            Window of turns considered "recent".

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlyrecentWeightBonus: 0.2

            Weight bonus to most recent events.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlysunkCost: { continuingWeightBonus: 0.3; triggerTurns: 3 }

          Sunk Cost bias.

          See

          FR-1505

          • ReadonlycontinuingWeightBonus: 0.3

            Weight bonus to continuing current strategy.

            See

            FR-1505

          • ReadonlytriggerTurns: 3

            Number of turns invested before bias triggers.

            See

            FR-1505

        • ReadonlydeferralChance: 0.2

          See

          FR-1503

        • ReadonlyimpulsivityChance: 0.1

          See

          FR-1503

        • ReadonlypeacetimeResetPerTurn: -20

          Peacetime fatigue reset per turn.

          See

          FR-1503

        • Readonlythreshold: 60

          See

          FR-1503

      • ReadonlyemotionalContagion: {
            autocracyContagionRate: 0.5;
            democracyContagionRate: 1;

            populationDivergenceThreshold: 40;
            stressPenaltyPerTurn: 5;
        }

        See

        FR-1518

        • ReadonlyautocracyContagionRate: 0.5

          Contagion rate in autocratic systems.

          See

          FR-1518

        • ReadonlydemocracyContagionRate: 1

          Contagion rate in democratic systems.

          See

          FR-1518

        • ReadonlydivergenceTurns: 3

          Number of turns divergence must persist to trigger penalty.

          See

          FR-1518

        • ReadonlyleaderToPopulationRate: 0.1

          Rate at which leader emotions spread to population.

          See

          FR-1518

        • ReadonlypopulationDivergenceThreshold: 40

          Divergence between leader and population moods that triggers stress.

          See

          FR-1518

        • ReadonlystressPenaltyPerTurn: 5

          Stress penalty per turn from mood divergence.

          See

          FR-1518

            See

            FR-1502

        • ReadonlyhighResolve: { stressGainReduction: 0.5; threshold: 70 }

          FR-1502

            FR-1502

          • Readonlythreshold: 70

            FR-1502

        • ReadonlyhighStress: { decisionNoiseRange: 0.15; threshold: 70 }

          FR-1503

            FR-1503

          • Readonlythreshold: 70

          FR-1517

        • ReadonlylowHopeTreasuryPenalty: -0.1

          See

          FR-1517

        • ReadonlynationalismUnrestDampening: -5

          FR-1517

      • ReadonlypersonalityDrift: {
            betrayalParanoiaIncrease: 15;
            nearLossPragmatismBoost: 10;

            riskToleranceShift: 10;

        See

        FR-1505

        • ReadonlybetrayalParanoiaIncrease: 15

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlynearLossPragmatismBoost: 10

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlynearLossResolveBoost: 10

          Resolve boost from near-loss recovery.

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlynearLossStabilityThreshold: 10

          Stability threshold below which constitutes a "near loss".

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlyriskToleranceShift: 10

          Risk-tolerance shift magnitude from stress drift.

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlystressDriftThreshold: 60

          Stress threshold that counts toward drift.

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlystressDriftTurns: 6

          Consecutive turns with stress above threshold to trigger drift.

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlyvictoryConfidenceBoost: 10

          Confidence boost from major victory.

          See

          FR-1505

        • ReadonlyvictoryNarcissismBoost: 5

          See

          FR-1505

          FR-1507

          See

          FR-1507

      • Readonlysycophancy: {
            newsDelay: 1;
            paranoiaThreshold: 70;
            reliabilityInflation: 15;
            securityThreshold: 80;
            unrestWarningDelay: 2;
        }

        See

        FR-1516

        • ReadonlynewsDelay: 1

          Bad news delivery delay in turns.

          See

          FR-1516

        • ReadonlyparanoiaThreshold: 70

          Paranoia threshold that enables sycophancy.

          See

          FR-1516

        • ReadonlyreliabilityInflation: 15

          Reliability inflation (false positives).

          See

          FR-1516

        • ReadonlysecurityThreshold: 80

          Security services power-base threshold that enables sycophancy.

          See

          FR-1516

        • ReadonlyunrestWarningDelay: 2

          Civil unrest warning delay in turns.

          See

          FR-1516

            See

            FR-1506

            See

            FR-1506

          • ReadonlyretreatChance: 0.2

            FR-1506

            nationalismResistanceReduction: -1;

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlycivilUnrestBonus: 5

          Civil unrest bonus per turn when weariness exceeds threshold.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlyeffectsThreshold: 70

          Weariness threshold at which negative effects begin.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlygreyZonePerTurn: 1

          Weariness increase per turn during grey-zone operations.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlynationalismResistanceReduction: -1

          Weariness reduction per turn from nationalism resistance.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlynationalismResistanceThreshold: 60

          Nationalism level above which weariness effects are resisted.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlypeacetimeDecayPerTurn: -2

          Weariness decay per turn during peacetime.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlypopularityDecayPerTurn: -3

          Popularity decay per turn when weariness exceeds threshold.

          See

          FR-1519

        • ReadonlytreasuryCostMultiplier: 1.25

          Treasury cost multiplier when weariness exceeds threshold.

          See

          FR-1519

        See

        FR-1905

        • ReadonlybiotechRecoveryThreshold: 50

          Biotech level for accelerated recovery.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlybiotechThreshold: 30

          Global average biotech below which pandemic risk increases.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlyborderClosureGDPPenalty: -0.05

          GDP penalty from border closure (fraction).

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlycooperativeLegitimacyGain: 10

          Legitimacy gain from cooperative response.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlygdpPenaltyPerTurn: -0.03

          Global GDP penalty per turn during pandemic (fraction).

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlyhighBiotechRecoveryTurns: 2

          Turns to develop countermeasures with Biotech >= 50.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlyhoardingLegitimacyPenalty: -10

          Legitimacy penalty from hoarding response.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlylowBiotechRecoveryTurns: 4

          Turns to develop countermeasures with Biotech < 50.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlystabilityThreshold: 15

          Stability below which pandemic risk increases.

          See

          FR-1905

        • ReadonlywarTheaterThreshold: 3

          Minimum active war theaters to increase risk.

          See

          FR-1905
