    • Readonlystability: {
          civilUnrestWeights: {
              ethnicTension: 0.15;
              foreignPropaganda: 0.15;
              inequality: 0.2;
              inflation: 0.3;
              repressionBacklash: 0.2;
          };
          civilWarExpanded: {
              economicGrowthMultiplier: -0.5;
              maxSplitFactions: 3;
              militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -10;
              minSplitFactions: 2;
              stabilityDecayPerTurn: -10;
              treasurySplitEqual: true;
          };
          coupAttempt: {
              militaryThreshold: 30;
              militaryWeight: 0.3;
              popularityWeight: 0.2;
              securityServicesThreshold: 30;
              securityServicesWeight: 0.3;
          };
          curfew: { economicActivityMultiplier: 0.5 };
          escalationThresholds: {
              civilWarMax: 100;
              civilWarMin: 81;
              grumblingMax: 20;
              insurrectionMax: 80;
              insurrectionMin: 61;
              protestsMax: 40;
              protestsMin: 21;
              riotsMax: 60;
              riotsMin: 41;
          };
          ethnicFunding: {
              hostileActionTensionIncrease: 8;
              maxFundingBoostPerTurn: 10;
              tensionPerCovertUnit: 0.15;
          };
          foreignPropaganda: { covertMultiplier: 0.1 };
          inequality: {
              growthRate: 3;
              growthThreshold: 2;
              max: 100;
              min: 0;
              socialSpendingEffect: -0.5;
          };
          insurrectionEffects: {
              militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -5;
              stabilityDecayPerTurn: -5;
          };
          insurrectionExpanded: {
              armedFactionsSpawned: 2;
              armedFactionStrength: 40;
              hexControlLossPerTurn: 3;
              militaryDiversionCost: -5;
          };
          martialLaw: {
              coupRiskMilitaryThreshold: 50;
              economicGrowthReduction: -0.3;
              popularityDecayPerTurn: -20;
              tensionIncreaseAllFactions: 10;
              unrestReduction: -30;
          };
          mediaManipulation: {
              baseSuccessProbability: 0.3;
              diCost: 5;
              foreignPropagandaRisk: 5;
              pressFreedomModifier: 0.005;
          };
          policeDeployment: { backlashIncrease: 5; unrestReduction: -10 };
          protestsEffects: {
              economicGrowthDecayPerTurn: -1;
              popularityDecayPerTurn: -2;
          };
          regimeChange: {
              civilUnrestThreshold: 100;
              personalityRandomizationRange: 20;
              stabilityThreshold: 0;
              successionClarityThreshold: 60;
              successorPowerBaseReduction: 20;
          };
          repressionBacklashThreshold: 50;
          riotsEffects: {
              moraleHitInRiotHex: -10;
              stabilityDecayPerTurn: -3;
              tourismFDIReduction: -0.2;
          };
      }
      • ReadonlycivilUnrestWeights: {
            ethnicTension: 0.15;
            foreignPropaganda: 0.15;
            inequality: 0.2;
            inflation: 0.3;
            repressionBacklash: 0.2;
        }

        See

        FR-1301

        • ReadonlyethnicTension: 0.15

          Weight of ethnic tension on civil unrest.

          See

          FR-1301

        • ReadonlyforeignPropaganda: 0.15

          Weight of foreign propaganda on civil unrest.

          See

          FR-1301

        • Readonlyinequality: 0.2

          Weight of inequality on civil unrest.

          See

          FR-1301

        • Readonlyinflation: 0.3

          Weight of inflation on civil unrest.

          See

          FR-1301

        • ReadonlyrepressionBacklash: 0.2

          Weight of repression backlash on civil unrest.

          See

          FR-1301

      • ReadonlycivilWarExpanded: {
            economicGrowthMultiplier: -0.5;
            maxSplitFactions: 3;
            militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -10;
            minSplitFactions: 2;
            stabilityDecayPerTurn: -10;
            treasurySplitEqual: true;
        }

        Civil war stage expanded mechanics (Phase 2).

        See

        FR-1302

        • ReadonlyeconomicGrowthMultiplier: -0.5

          Economic growth penalty during civil war.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlymaxSplitFactions: 3

          Maximum faction split count.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlymilitaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -10

          Military readiness decay per turn.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyminSplitFactions: 2

          Minimum faction split count (nation divides into 2-3 factions).

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlystabilityDecayPerTurn: -10

          Stability decay per turn during civil war.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlytreasurySplitEqual: true

          Treasury split factor — each faction gets 1/n of treasury.

          See

          FR-1302

      • ReadonlycoupAttempt: {
            militaryThreshold: 30;
            militaryWeight: 0.3;
            popularityWeight: 0.2;
            securityServicesThreshold: 30;
            securityServicesWeight: 0.3;
        }

        Coup attempt formula parameters.

        See

        FR-1311

        • ReadonlymilitaryThreshold: 30

          PowerBase.military threshold below which coup is possible.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlymilitaryWeight: 0.3

          Weight of (100 − military) in coup probability.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlypopularityWeight: 0.2

          Weight of popularity subtracted from coup probability.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlysecurityServicesThreshold: 30

          PowerBase.securityServices threshold below which coup is possible.

          See

          FR-1311

        • ReadonlysecurityServicesWeight: 0.3

          Weight of (100 − securityServices) in coup probability.

          See

          FR-1311

      • Readonlycurfew: { economicActivityMultiplier: 0.5 }

        Curfew effects.

        See

        FR-1302

        • ReadonlyeconomicActivityMultiplier: 0.5

          Economic activity multiplier during curfew (halved).

          See

          FR-1302

      • ReadonlyescalationThresholds: {
            civilWarMax: 100;
            civilWarMin: 81;
            grumblingMax: 20;
            insurrectionMax: 80;
            insurrectionMin: 61;
            protestsMax: 40;
            protestsMin: 21;
            riotsMax: 60;
            riotsMin: 41;
        }

        Escalation stage threshold bands.

        See

        FR-1302

        • ReadonlycivilWarMax: 100

          Civil War range upper bound.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlycivilWarMin: 81

          Civil War range: 81-100.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlygrumblingMax: 20

          Grumbling range: 0-20.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyinsurrectionMax: 80

          Insurrection range upper bound.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyinsurrectionMin: 61

          Insurrection range: 61-80.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyprotestsMax: 40

          Protests range upper bound.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyprotestsMin: 21

          Protests range: 21-40.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyriotsMax: 60

          Riots range upper bound.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyriotsMin: 41

          Riots range: 41-60.

          See

          FR-1302

      • ReadonlyethnicFunding: {
            hostileActionTensionIncrease: 8;
            maxFundingBoostPerTurn: 10;
            tensionPerCovertUnit: 0.15;
        }

        Ethnic fault-line foreign-funded separatism.

        See

        FR-1303

        • ReadonlyhostileActionTensionIncrease: 8

          Tension increase from hostile government actions toward minorities.

          See

          FR-1303

        • ReadonlymaxFundingBoostPerTurn: 10

          Maximum tension boost from foreign funding per turn.

          See

          FR-1303

        • ReadonlytensionPerCovertUnit: 0.15

          Tension increase per turn per unit of foreign COVERT funding.

          See

          FR-1303

      • ReadonlyforeignPropaganda: { covertMultiplier: 0.1 }

        Foreign propaganda rate.

        See

        FR-1305

        • ReadonlycovertMultiplier: 0.1

          CivilUnrest increase per turn = targetCovert × rate.

          See

          FR-1305

      • Readonlyinequality: {
            growthRate: 3;
            growthThreshold: 2;
            max: 100;
            min: 0;
            socialSpendingEffect: -0.5;
        }

        Inequality computation parameters.

        See

        FR-1306

        • ReadonlygrowthRate: 3

          Inequality growth per turn when GDP grows without social spending.

          See

          FR-1306

        • ReadonlygrowthThreshold: 2

          GDP growth rate threshold above which inequality rises without social spending.

          See

          FR-1306

        • Readonlymax: 100

          Maximum inequality value.

          See

          FR-1306

        • Readonlymin: 0

          Minimum inequality value.

          See

          FR-1306

        • ReadonlysocialSpendingEffect: -0.5

          Inequality reduction per unit of social spending (Treasury).

          See

          FR-1306

      • ReadonlyinsurrectionEffects: { militaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -5; stabilityDecayPerTurn: -5 }

        Effects during Insurrection stage.

        See

        FR-1304

        • ReadonlymilitaryReadinessDecayPerTurn: -5

          Military readiness decay per turn during insurrection.

          See

          FR-1304

        • ReadonlystabilityDecayPerTurn: -5

          Stability decay per turn during insurrection.

          See

          FR-1304

      • ReadonlyinsurrectionExpanded: {
            armedFactionsSpawned: 2;
            armedFactionStrength: 40;
            hexControlLossPerTurn: 3;
            militaryDiversionCost: -5;
        }

        Insurrection stage expanded mechanics (Phase 2).

        See

        FR-1302

        • ReadonlyarmedFactionsSpawned: 2

          Number of armed faction units spawned at insurrection onset.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyarmedFactionStrength: 40

          Strength of each spawned armed faction (0-100).

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyhexControlLossPerTurn: 3

          Hexes government loses control of per turn during insurrection.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlymilitaryDiversionCost: -5

          MilitaryReadiness cost for diverting forces to insurrection.

          See

          FR-1302

      • ReadonlymartialLaw: {
            coupRiskMilitaryThreshold: 50;
            economicGrowthReduction: -0.3;
            popularityDecayPerTurn: -20;
            tensionIncreaseAllFactions: 10;
            unrestReduction: -30;
        }

        Martial law effects.

        See

        FR-1309

        • ReadonlycoupRiskMilitaryThreshold: 50

          Military power-base threshold triggering coup risk.

          See

          FR-1309

        • ReadonlyeconomicGrowthReduction: -0.3

          Economic growth reduction under martial law.

          See

          FR-1309

        • ReadonlypopularityDecayPerTurn: -20

          Popularity decay per turn under martial law.

          See

          FR-1309

        • ReadonlytensionIncreaseAllFactions: 10

          Tension increase to all factions from martial law.

          See

          FR-1309

        • ReadonlyunrestReduction: -30

          Immediate civil unrest reduction from martial law.

          See

          FR-1309

      • ReadonlymediaManipulation: {
            baseSuccessProbability: 0.3;
            diCost: 5;
            foreignPropagandaRisk: 5;
            pressFreedomModifier: 0.005;
        }

        Media manipulation parameters.

        See

        FR-1307

        • ReadonlybaseSuccessProbability: 0.3

          Base success probability (0-1).

          See

          FR-1307

        • ReadonlydiCost: 5

          Diplomatic influence cost per manipulation attempt.

          See

          FR-1307

        • ReadonlyforeignPropagandaRisk: 5

          Foreign propaganda risk increase on success (autocracy vulnerability).

          See

          FR-1307

        • ReadonlypressFreedomModifier: 0.005

          Press freedom modifier: higher press freedom → lower success. Formula: base + (100 − pressFreedom) × modifier.

          See

          FR-1307

      • ReadonlypoliceDeployment: { backlashIncrease: 5; unrestReduction: -10 }

        Police deployment effects.

        See

        FR-1302

        • ReadonlybacklashIncrease: 5

          Repression backlash added from deploying police.

          See

          FR-1302

        • ReadonlyunrestReduction: -10

          Immediate civil unrest reduction from deploying police.

          See

          FR-1302

      • ReadonlyprotestsEffects: { economicGrowthDecayPerTurn: -1; popularityDecayPerTurn: -2 }

        Effects during Protests stage.

        See

        FR-1304

        • ReadonlyeconomicGrowthDecayPerTurn: -1

          Economic growth decay per turn during protests.

          See

          FR-1304

        • ReadonlypopularityDecayPerTurn: -2

          Popularity decay per turn during protests.

          See

          FR-1304

      • ReadonlyregimeChange: {
            civilUnrestThreshold: 100;
            personalityRandomizationRange: 20;
            stabilityThreshold: 0;
            successionClarityThreshold: 60;
            successorPowerBaseReduction: 20;
        }

        Regime change trigger conditions.

        See

        FR-1308

        • ReadonlycivilUnrestThreshold: 100

          Civil unrest at-or-above which regime change occurs.

          See

          FR-1308

        • ReadonlypersonalityRandomizationRange: 20

          ±variance applied to all psychological dimensions on regime change.

          See

          FR-1308

        • ReadonlystabilityThreshold: 0

          Stability at-or-below which regime change occurs.

          See

          FR-1308

        • ReadonlysuccessionClarityThreshold: 60

          SuccessionClarity threshold allowing player to continue as successor.

          See

          FR-1309

        • ReadonlysuccessorPowerBaseReduction: 20

          Power base reduction applied to successor after regime change.

          See

          FR-1309

      • ReadonlyrepressionBacklashThreshold: 50

        Repression backlash feedback loop threshold.

        See

        FR-1304

      • ReadonlyriotsEffects: {
            moraleHitInRiotHex: -10;

            tourismFDIReduction: -0.2;
        }

        FR-1304

        • ReadonlymoraleHitInRiotHex: -10

          FR-1304

        • ReadonlystabilityDecayPerTurn: -3

          Stability decay per turn during riots.

          See

          FR-1304

        • ReadonlytourismFDIReduction: -0.2

          See

          FR-1304

              strategicAI: 90;
              strategicAIConfidenceImprovement: 0.3;

              aiTrigger: 60;

              refusalLegitimacyPenalty: -5;
              secretViolationLegitimacyPenalty: -25;

          };
          exportControl: {

              unilateralDICost: -3;
          };
          investment: { baseCostPerLevel: 10; exponentialThreshold: 50 };

              threatThreshold: 70;
          };

          techDecoupling: {
              crossBlocCyberBonus: 0.15;
              globalGDPPenalty: -0.01;
              intraBlocIntelBonus: 0.1;
              mutualExportControlThreshold: 60;
              nonAlignedCostMultiplier: 1.5;
          };
      }

    • Readonlytutorial: {
          advisoryOverlayTurns: 3;
          autoSkipAfterGames: 1;
          hotkeys: {
              actionMenu: "a";
              diplomacyPanel: "d";
              endTurn: "Enter";
              intelligencePanel: "i";
              loadGame: "ctrl+l";
              saveGame: "ctrl+s";
              strategicDashboard: "Tab";
          };
      }

        CNFL-2805

        }

              diPenalty: -10;
              durationTurns: 6;
              legitimacyPenalty: -15;
          };
          passingThreshold: 0.5;
          peacekeeping: {
              civilUnrestReduction: -15;
              diCostToProposer: -5;
              durationTurns: 8;
              stabilityBonus: 10;
          };
          sanctions: {
              durationTurns: 12;
              gdpGrowthPenalty: -0.15;
              legitimacyPenalty: -10;
              tradeReduction: 0.2;
          };
          votingWeights: {

              relationshipWithProposer: 0.3;
              relationshipWithTarget: 0.3;
              strategicInterest: 0.2;
          };
      }

        Condemnation resolution effects.

        See

        FR-703

        • ReadonlydiPenalty: -10

          Diplomatic influence penalty on targeted nation.

        • ReadonlydurationTurns: 6

          Duration in turns.

        • ReadonlylegitimacyPenalty: -15

          Legitimacy penalty on targeted nation.

      • ReadonlypassingThreshold: 0.5

        Voting threshold: percentage of votes needed to pass.

        See

        FR-703

      • Readonlypeacekeeping: {
            civilUnrestReduction: -15;
            diCostToProposer: -5;
            durationTurns: 8;
            stabilityBonus: 10;
        }

        See

        FR-703

          Civil unrest reduction in target nation.

        • ReadonlystabilityBonus: 10

            durationTurns: 12;

            legitimacyPenalty: -10;
            tradeReduction: 0.2;
        }

        Sanctions resolution effects.

        See

        FR-703

          Duration in turns before automatic expiry.

        • ReadonlygdpGrowthPenalty: -0.15

          GDP growth penalty applied to targeted nation.

        • ReadonlylegitimacyPenalty: -10

          Legitimacy penalty on targeted nation.

        • ReadonlytradeReduction: 0.2

          Trade volume reduction percentage.

      • ReadonlyvotingWeights: {
            legitimacyImpact: 0.2;
            relationshipWithProposer: 0.3;
            relationshipWithTarget: 0.3;
            strategicInterest: 0.2;
        }

        FR-703

        • ReadonlyrelationshipWithTarget: 0.3

          Weight of relationship with target.

        • ReadonlystrategicInterest: 0.2

          Weight of strategic interest alignment.

    • ReadonlyvictoryLoss: {
          vc01_hegemonicDominance: {
              consecutiveTurns: 6;
              diplomaticInfluenceMin: 70;
              militaryReadinessMin: 60;
              stabilityMin: 80;
          };
          vc02_economicSupremacy: {
              consecutiveTurns: 12;
              rivalCountForComparison: 2;
          };
          vc03_pax: { consecutiveTurns: 12; tensionMax: 20 };
          vc04_governmentCollapse: {
              civilUnrestTrigger: 100;
              stabilityTrigger: 0;
              successionClarityThreshold: 60;
          };
          vc05_nuclearWinter: {
              nuclearThresholdTrigger: 100;
              secondStrikeProbability: 0.9;
          };
          vc06_isolation: { consecutiveTurns: 6; tensionMin: 80 };
          vc07_survival: {
              scoreWeights: { diplomaticInfluence: 1; gdp: 1; stability: 1 };
          };
          vc08_coup: {
              powerBaseMilitaryMax: 30;
              powerBaseSecurityMax: 30;
              successionClarityThreshold: 60;
          };
          vc09_peoplesRevolution: { civilUnrestTrigger: 100 };
          vc10_ironFist: {
              civilUnrestFloor: 40;
              requiredTurns: 60;
              stabilityCeiling: 50;
          };
          vc11_grandStrategist: {
              eligibleBaseVictories: readonly ["VC-01", "VC-02", "VC-03", "VC-10"];
              requiredGrade: "S";
          };
          vc12_puppetMaster: {
              discoveryAllowed: false;
              emotionalThreshold: 70;
              minManipulatedLeaders: 3;
          };
          vc13_unbreakable: {
              finalResolveMin: 80;
              finalStabilityMin: 60;
              minTraumaEvents: 3;
          };
          vc14_informationHegemon: {
              consecutiveTurns: 12;
              legitimacyMin: 90;
              maxSuccessfulDeepfakes: 0;
              minNarrativeBattleWins: 5;
          };
          vc15_shadowEmperor: {
              maxDirectCombatActions: 0;
              minStrategicObjectives: 3;
          };
          vc16_techSingularity: {
              aiMin: 90;
              quantumMin: 70;
              semiconductorsMin: 80;
              stabilityMin: 60;
          };
          vc17_resourceLord: {
              diplomaticInfluenceMin: 70;
              maxMilitaryCoercionActions: 0;
              minResourceCategories: 2;
              resourceControlThreshold: 50;
          };
      }
      • Readonlyvc01_hegemonicDominance: {
            consecutiveTurns: 6;
            diplomaticInfluenceMin: 70;
            militaryReadinessMin: 60;
            stabilityMin: 80;
        }

        VC-01 Hegemonic Dominance thresholds.

        See

        §13

      • Readonlyvc02_economicSupremacy: { consecutiveTurns: 12; rivalCountForComparison: 2 }

        VC-02 Economic Supremacy thresholds.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlyconsecutiveTurns: 12
        • ReadonlyrivalCountForComparison: 2

          Player GDP must exceed combined top-2 rival GDPs.

      • Readonlyvc03_pax: { consecutiveTurns: 12; tensionMax: 20 }

        VC-03 Pax [Nation] thresholds.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlyconsecutiveTurns: 12
        • ReadonlytensionMax: 20

          All bilateral tensions must be below this.

      • Readonlyvc04_governmentCollapse: { civilUnrestTrigger: 100; stabilityTrigger: 0; successionClarityThreshold: 60 }

        VC-04 Government Collapse triggers.

        See

        §13, FR-1309

        • ReadonlycivilUnrestTrigger: 100
        • ReadonlystabilityTrigger: 0
        • ReadonlysuccessionClarityThreshold: 60

          SuccessionClarity threshold to survive regime change.

      • Readonlyvc05_nuclearWinter: { nuclearThresholdTrigger: 100; secondStrikeProbability: 0.9 }

        VC-05 Nuclear Winter: any nuclearThreshold reaching this triggers all-lose.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlynuclearThresholdTrigger: 100
        • ReadonlysecondStrikeProbability: 0.9

          Second-strike counter-attack probability.

          See

          FR-505

      • Readonlyvc06_isolation: { consecutiveTurns: 6; tensionMin: 80 }

        VC-06 Isolation thresholds.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlyconsecutiveTurns: 6

          All factions must be above this tension.

        • ReadonlytensionMin: 80
      • Readonlyvc07_survival: { scoreWeights: { diplomaticInfluence: 1; gdp: 1; stability: 1 } }

        VC-07 Survival (conditional): turn limit and scoring.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlyscoreWeights: { diplomaticInfluence: 1; gdp: 1; stability: 1 }

          Composite score = Stability + GDP + DiplomaticInfluence.

      • Readonlyvc08_coup: {
            powerBaseMilitaryMax: 30;
            powerBaseSecurityMax: 30;
            successionClarityThreshold: 60;
        }

        See

        §13

      • Readonlyvc09_peoplesRevolution: { civilUnrestTrigger: 100 }

        VC-09 People's Revolution trigger.

        See

        §13

      • Readonlyvc10_ironFist: { civilUnrestFloor: 40; requiredTurns: 60; stabilityCeiling: 50 }

        VC-10 Iron Fist thresholds.

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlycivilUnrestFloor: 40

          CivilUnrest must never drop below this.

        • ReadonlyrequiredTurns: 60

          Must maintain for full game duration (60 turns).

        • ReadonlystabilityCeiling: 50

          Stability must never rise above this.

      • Readonlyvc11_grandStrategist: {
            eligibleBaseVictories: readonly ["VC-01", "VC-02", "VC-03", "VC-10"];
            requiredGrade: "S";
        }

        See

        §13, FR-1410

        • ReadonlyeligibleBaseVictories: readonly ["VC-01", "VC-02", "VC-03", "VC-10"]

          Must achieve a base victory (VC-01, VC-02, VC-03, or VC-10).

        • ReadonlyrequiredGrade: "S"

        See

        §13

        • ReadonlydiscoveryAllowed: false

          Must not be discovered.

        • ReadonlyemotionalThreshold: 70
        • ReadonlyminManipulatedLeaders: 3

          Min rival leaders manipulated via PsyOps.
